1000651155.english: And since energy supply is important, don't reduce your meal portions.
1000651155.korean: 그리고 당신은 에너지 공급이 중요하니까 식사량은 줄이지 마세요.

1000651156.english: Okay? You should eat the same amount you usually do.
1000651156.korean: 알았죠? 평소 먹는 양만큼 먹어야 합니다.

1000651157.english: Yes, I'll wait until you call me.

1000651158.english: It's fortunate that you have a diet method and someone to guide you.
1000651158.korean: 다이어트 방법도, 옆에서 지도해 줄 사람도 있으니 다행이네요.

1000651159.english: Heh heh. I'll work hard this time and... the commander...
1000651159.korean: 후훗. 이번 기회에 열심히 해서 사령관님을...

1000651160.english: But... Wouldn't it be okay to eat a little less?
1000651160.korean: 그런데... 조금은 먹는 양을 줄여도 괜찮지 않을까요?

1000651161.english: Is that a sidekick? Stretch your legs out further.
1000651161.korean: 그게 사이드 킥인가요? 다리를 더 쭉 뻗으세요.

1000651162.english: I haven't even started yet. Jab, punch, hook.
1000651162.korean: 아직 시작도 안 했어요. 잽, 펀치, 훅.

1000651164.english: Just watch the video and follow along. Just follow me.

1000651166.english: Strato Angel. I didn't tense my stomach. Brace your core.
1000651166.korean: 스트라토 엔젤. 배에 힘 안 줬어요. 배에 힘.

1000651168.english: Don't lie down, get up and take slow, deep breaths. Okay, let's swing our arms around.
1000651168.korean: 눕지 말고 일어나서 천천히 숨을 고르세요. 자자, 팔도 돌리면서.

1000651169.english: What exactly is Night Angel...? How can I hold on?
1000651169.korean: 도대체 나이트 앤젤은... 어떻게 버틸 수 있죠?

1000651170.english: Didn't I tell you I exercise regularly? This body didn't just happen by chance, did it?
1000651170.korean: 평소에도 운동을 한다고 말했잖습니까. 이 몸매가 그냥 만들어질 리 없잖아요.

1000651171.english: Wouldn't this be a lot of weight loss? Weighing myself is...
1000651171.korean: 이 정도면 많이 빠지지 않았을까요? 체중을 재보는 건...

1000651172.english: No, you can't. If you weigh yourself unnecessarily, you might relax and become lazy.
1000651172.korean: 안됩니다. 괜히 몸무게를 쟀다가는 안심해서 게을러질 수도 있어요.

1000651173.english: And rather than losing weight, the goal is to reduce subcutaneous fat and overall body fat.
1000651173.korean: 그리고 몸무게를 줄이는 것보다는 피하지방과 전신의 군살을 빼는 게 목표입니다.

1000651174.english: Are you going to keep lying there like that? Have you given up on losing weight to seduce the commander?
1000651174.korean: 계속 그렇게 누워있을 겁니까? 살을 빼서 사령관님을 유혹하는 건 포기했나요?

1000651175.english: No. I'm more... I can do it...!
1000651175.korean: 아뇨. 저는 더... 할 수 있어요...!

1000651176.english: Get up. You just keep going with that determination.
1000651176.korean: 일어나세요. 그 의지로 계속 하는 겁니다.

1000651177.english: Okay, tighten your core. Clench your fists and get into position!
1000651177.korean: 자, 배에 힘. 주먹 쥐고 자세 잡고!

1000651179.english: Night Angel. I... What about me?

1000651180.english: You don't have to rush me like that, I'll tell you anyway, so just wait a bit. Let's see...
1000651180.korean: 그렇게 재촉하지 않아도 말해줄 거니까, 좀 기다리세요. 어디 보자...

1000651181.english: I've lost a lot of belly fat and overall, I've slimmed down.
1000651181.korean: 복부 지방도 많이 줄어들고, 전체적으로 군살이 빠졌네요.

1000651182.english: The diet results are definitely showing.

1000651183.english: Okay, then. I also want a more beautiful body.
1000651183.korean: 그, 그럼. 저도 더 예쁜 몸매를-

1000651184.english: If it goes on like this, I'll be able to have it. But you shouldn't let your guard down.
1000651184.korean: 이대로라면 가질 수 있겠죠. 하지만 방심해서는 안 돼요.

1000651185.english: The reason why it's hard to maintain your figure isn't just the exercise, but also how incredibly easy it is to revert back to your previous body shape.
1000651185.korean: 몸매 관리가 힘든 이유는 운동도 있겠지만, 이전 몸매로 되돌아가버리기 너무나도 쉽다는 겁니다.

1000651186.english: It seems like the results are showing up a bit quickly. Are you eating properly?
1000651186.korean: 성과가 좀 빠르게 나타나는 것 같은데, 식사는 제대로 하고 있습니까?

1000651187.english: That's... I ate a little less than usual.
1000651187.korean: 그게... 평소 먹는 양보다는 조금 줄였어요.

1000651188.english: ... Eat properly. Don't make yourself miserable later by getting hungry for no reason.
1000651188.korean: ...제대로 드세요. 괜히 나중에 배고파서 힘들어하지 말고.

1000651189.english: But you've lost a noticeable amount of weight since you've been eating less, haven't you?
1000651189.korean: 그래도 적게 먹으니까 눈에 띄게 빠졌잖아요?

1000651190.english: It would be fine normally, but... Starting today, aren't you on the Night operations team?
1000651190.korean: 평소라면 괜찮겠지만... 오늘부터는 야간 작전조 아닙니까.

1000651191.english: You'll be hungry after the operation is over.

1000651192.english: That being said, don't eat it at Night.

1000651193.english: Because you can't eat even one banana.
1000651193.korean: 당신은 바나나 한 개라도 먹으면 안 되니까.

1000651194.english: It's okay, I'll go straight to sleep when I get back.

1000651195.english: Sigh... I'm telling you clearly, eat properly.

1000651196.english: I'm going to wash up first.

1000651198.english: Come to think of it, Genie was in the operation team this time...
1000651198.korean: 그러고 보니, 이번 작전조에는 지니야가 있었는데...

1000651200.english: No problems today either. Everyone worked hard, please rest well.
1000651200.korean: 오늘도 별다른 문제는 없네요. 다들 수고 많았고, 편히 쉬세요.

1000651201.english: Have a good Night too, Colonel Strato!

1000651202.english: Hehe. I should eat quickly and go to bed.

1000651203.english: Is that... Genie? Late-night snack at this hour... And two cup noodles at that?
1000651203.korean: 지, 지니야? 이 시간에 야식을... 그것도 컵라면을 두 개씩이나?

1000651204.english: I heard from someone at Steel Line the other day that it's delicious when you mix it like this!
1000651204.korean: 저번에 스틸라인 쪽에서 들었는데~ 이렇게 섞어서 먹으면 맛있데요!

1000651205.english: Colonel, would you like to have some too?

1000651206.english: But Night Angel said you shouldn't eat late at night...
1000651206.korean: 하지만 늦은 시간에 먹으면 안 된다고 나이트 앤젤이...

1000651207.english: Ah ha! Then let's eat together next time!

1000651208.english: Let's do that. ... Um, but, uh... Are you a genie?

1000651209.english: Could I maybe have just one bite...?

1000651210.english: Hehe. Colonel, you can eat as much as you like.

1000651211.english: Just in case, I've prepared several, so just let me know!
1000651211.korean: 혹시나 해서 여러 개를 준비해뒀으니까~ 말씀만 하세요!

1000651213.english: Just one bite... Just one bite, okay?

1000651214.english: Okay, wait a minute! Ugh... Oh my... Let's take a break for a moment.
1000651214.korean: 자, 잠깐! 흐악... 하악... 잠깐만 쉬어요.

1000651215.english: Why is that lately? I feel like my stamina is lower than last time.
1000651215.korean: 요즘 따라 왜 그런가요. 저번보다 체력이 떨어진 것 같은데.

1000651216.english: Um, it's just because I haven't been able to exercise much lately due to Night operations.
1000651216.korean: 그, 그냥 야간 작전 때문에 운동을 자주 못해서 그래요.

1000651217.english: For something like that, the movements have become quite heavy, just like-
1000651217.korean: 그런 것치고는 동작이 무거워진 게 꼭-

1000651219.english: I don't like it. I'll measure it separately later and let you know. Finish your workout.
1000651219.korean: 싫어요. 나중에 따로 잰 뒤에 알려 드릴게요. 마저 운동을-

1000651220.english: Really? Then there's nothing we can do.

1000651221.english: What is it? Don't do anything strange.

1000651223.english: Why are you lifting up other people's clothes?!

1000651224.english: As expected... Sigh. Just be honest. What on earth have you done?
1000651224.korean: 역시나... 하아. 솔직하게 말씀하시죠. 대체 무슨 짓을 한 겁니까?

1000651225.english: ... If I'm honest, will you forgive me?

1000651229.english: Do you remember what I said? It means to eat properly.
1000651229.korean: 제가 말했던 거 기억하나요? 끼니 제대로 챙기라는 거

1000651231.english: Didn't you say you shouldn't eat even one banana at Night?
1000651231.korean: 당신은 밤에 바나나 한 개라도 먹으면 안 된다고 했던 건?

1000651233.english: But you eat small portions at every meal, which only increases your hunger, and you end up eating a late-night snack?
1000651233.korean: 그런데 매 끼니는 적게 먹어서 공복감만 커지고, 결국에는 야식을 먹어요?

1000651234.english: Two cup noodles... And that every time the Night operation ends?
1000651234.korean: 컵라면을 두 개씩이나... 그것도 야간 작전이 끝날 때마다?

1000651235.english: At first, I was only going to eat one chopstick-full... That's...
1000651235.korean: 처음에는 한 젓가락만 먹으려고 했는데... 그게...

1000651236.english: I told you not to eat it.

1000651238.english: What can you do about something that's already been done?

1000651239.english: It seems even thicker than before.

1000651240.english: Sigh. How am I supposed to return this...?

1000651241.english: So, what do we do now...?

1000651242.english: I didn't want to use this method because I was thinking of you, but... There's nothing we can do about it.
1000651242.korean: 당신을 생각해서 이 방법만은 쓰지 않으려고 했지만... 어쩔 수 없죠.

1000651243.english: Strato Angel, from now on, you must trust me completely.
1000651243.korean: 스트라토 엔젤, 지금부터는 저를 전적으로 믿어야합니다.

1000651244.english: Especially if you want to curry favor with the commander.

1000651246.english: If you don't follow it even a little bit, you can't succeed... What do you want to do?
1000651246.korean: 조금이라도 따르지 않는다면 성공할 수 없는데... 어떻게 할래요?

1000651247.english: This time, I'll definitely follow your instructions carefully!
1000651247.korean: 이번에는 반드시 시킨 대로 잘 따를게요!

1000651248.english: Then this way... If you follow the instructions of the Strato Angel well, it's an exercise you can enjoy.
1000651248.korean: 그럼 이쪽으로... 스트라토 엔젤만 잘 따라준다면 즐겁게 할 수 있는 운동입니다.

1000651249.english: Huh? Yes! But where are we going?
1000651249.korean: 네? 네! 그런데 어디로 가는 건가요?

1000651250.english: Just follow me, no questions asked.

1000651251.english: Don't pull so hard, at least tell me where we're going- Aah...!
1000651251.korean: 그렇게 잡아당기지 말고, 최소한 어디로 가는지 정도는- 아앗...!

1000651253.english: - I was so busy checking the pile of documents that I couldn't get out of my chair.
1000651253.korean: - 나는 쌓인 문서 더미를 확인하느라, 의자에서 엉덩이를 떼지 못하고 있었다.

1000651254.english: - Still, at this pace, we'll have plenty of time today. -

1000651255.english: Hey, isn't this the commander's room? Night Angel? I've come to the wrong place...
1000651255.korean: 여, 여기는 사령관님 방인데요? 나이트 앤젤? 잘못 찾아온 게...

1000651256.english: It's the right one. ... Commander, this is Night Angel.
1000651256.korean: 제대로 온 게 맞습니다. ...사령관님, 나이트 앤젤입니다.

1000651257.english: I apologize for interrupting you during your work.

1000651258.english: My sister is trying to lose weight, could you help her a bit?
1000651258.korean: 제 자매가 살을 빼려는데 좀 도와주실 수 있겠습니까.

1000651259.english: Why are you telling the commander about that!

1000651260.english: Didn't the commander say he needs to exercise a bit these days too? Why don't the two of you exercise together now?
1000651260.korean: 사령관도 요즘 운동 좀 해야겠다고 하셨잖아요? 이참에 둘이서 운동하시죠.

1000651261.english: - I did say I should exercise too, but...

1000651262.english: I thought the same at first, but asking the commander would be more reliable.
1000651262.korean: 저도 처음에는 그렇게 생각했는데, 사령관님께 부탁하는 편이 더 확실할걸요.

1000651263.english: Because I want to impress the commander.

1000651264.english: - Looking at Strato Angel, she was lowering her head with a slight blush on her face.
1000651264.korean: - 스트라토 엔젤을 쳐다보자, 그녀는 얼굴을 약간 붉힌 채로 고개를 떨구고 있었다.

1000651265.english: Of course, it's to look good for the commander, but... Like this, suddenly-
1000651265.korean: 물론 사령관님께 예쁘게 보이려는 거지만... 이런 식으로 갑자기는-

1000651266.english: You should also be more proactive and not hesitate.
1000651266.korean: 당신도 쭈뼛거리지 말고 좀 적극적으로 하세요.

1000651267.english: Because one of those is enough. Ugh.
1000651267.korean: 그런 건 한 명이면 충분하니까요. 에잇.

1000651268.english: - I caught the Stratos Angel as she stumbled and fell into my arms.
1000651268.korean: - 밀려 넘어지는 스트라토 엔젤을 내 품으로 받았다.

1000651269.english: Why are you pushing all of a sudden? Night Angel!

1000651271.english: Night Angel! They said they'd teach me how to exercise, and then they suddenly do this...
1000651271.korean: 나이트 앤젤! 운동을 알려준다면서 갑자기 이러기나 하고...

1000651272.english: It's because I'm frustrated. Since I've done this much for you, you can handle the rest yourself.
1000651272.korean: 답답해서 그렇습니다. 이렇게까지 해줬으니까, 남은 건 알아서 하세요.

1000651273.english: And Commander. You're not going to play a trick on me again, are you?
1000651273.korean: 그리고 사령관님. 설마 또 장난치지는 않으실 거죠?

1000651274.english: - I can feel the piercing gaze of Night Angel.

1000651275.english: Well... Since that's how it turned out, I'll be counting on you again this time.
1000651275.korean: 뭐... 그렇게 되었으니까, 이번에도 잘 좀 부탁할게요.

1000651276.english: - Having finished speaking, Night Angel left the room as he was.
1000651276.korean: - 말을 마친 나이트 앤젤은 그대로 방을 나섰다.

1000651277.english: - The situation unfolded in an instant, and Stratos Angel and I stood there dumbfounded for a long time.
1000651277.korean: - 그야말로 순식간에 몰아닥친 상황에 나와 스트라토 엔젤은 한참을 멍하니 서있었다.

1000651278.english: Um... Commander? The exercise Night Angel mentioned...
1000651278.korean: 저... 사령관님? 나이트 앤젤이 말한 운동이라는 게...

1000651279.english: - Exercise, you say? I don't know much about diet exercises either, but... Perhaps...
1000651279.korean: - 운동, 운동이라니. 다이어트 운동법은 나도 잘 모르지만... 아마도...

1000651280.english: - I pulled the arms wrapped around the Stratos Angel's waist closer.
1000651280.korean: - 나는 스트라토 엔젤의 허리에 감긴 팔을 더 끌어당겼다.

1000651282.english: Okay, please take care of it. Commander.

1000651285.english: No. Even if you take a break, keep your arms moving!

1000651286.english: - It's quite different from the exercise I had in mind...

1000651288.english: You said you'd help me exercise, right? Hang in there a little longer!
1000651288.korean: 운동하는 거 도와준다고 하셨죠? 좀 더 힘내요!

1000651289.english: - If anyone sees this, they'll kill me-
1000651289.korean: - 만일 누군가 이 광경을 본다면 나를 살-

1000651290.english: Come on, come on. Don't think about anything else, just look at the screen!
1000651290.korean: 자 자. 다른 생각 하지 마시고 화면 보시면서!

1000651291.english: Just follow along. Just follow me! Clench your fists tight! Jab, punch, hook!
1000651291.korean: 따라만하세요. 따라만! 주먹 꽉 쥐고! 잽, 펀치, 훅!

1000651293.english: When am I going to check all this?
1000651293.korean: 이 많은 걸 언제 다 확인해?

1000651294.english: There's no choice... Call me if you find anything.
1000651294.korean: 어쩔 수 없지... 뭐라도 발견하면 불러.

1000651295.english: Yeah. But do you really need to go this far?
1000651295.korean: 응. 하지만 이렇게까지 할 필요가 있어?

1000651296.english: So, what should we do? Who was it who said they were anxious?
1000651296.korean: 그럼 어떻게 할까? 불안하다고 말한 게 누구였는데?

1000651297.english: That being said... How about gently suggesting it?
1000651297.korean: 그건 그렇지만... 천천히 권유해 보는 건-

1000651298.english: That. Ru. You. Ugh! I've told you several times that you need to take the initiative now.
1000651298.korean: 그.러.니.까! 지금은 적극적으로 나서야 한다고 몇 번이나 말했지.

1000651299.english: The commander hasn't been drinking milk lately, and I'm worried about that...
1000651299.korean: 사령관이 요즘 우유를 안 마셔서 걱정이라니...

1000651300.english: Why go thru all this when you could just ask directly?
1000651300.korean: 그냥 직접 물어보면 되는 걸 굳이 이렇게?

1000651301.english: If I ask and they feel pressured...

1000651302.english: Sigh. I'm frustrated. I'd rather do it myself, like last time.
1000651302.korean: 하아. 답답해. 차라리 저번처럼 내가 직접-

1000651303.english: Oh, no! You said you'd cooperate!

1000651304.english: Then. Instead of complaining, find one more thing.
1000651304.korean: 그럼. 싫은 소리 할 시간에 하나라도 더 찾아봐.

1000651306.english: I'm helping because I'm also involved with our milk.
1000651306.korean: 나도 우리 우유랑 관련 있으니까 도와주는 거야.

1000651307.english: I'll go this way, so you go that way.
1000651307.korean: 내가 이쪽으로 갈거니까 너는 저쪽으로 가.

1000651310.english: Nothing particularly special... It's all the same content.
1000651310.korean: 그다지 특별한 건... 다 비슷한 내용뿐이고.

1000651311.english: Was it how to manage cows, or how to purify milk...? I'm already doing it.
1000651311.korean: 소의 관리법이던가, 우유 정제법이던가... 이미 하고 있는데?

1000651312.english: Isn't there a way to make even our milk seem special?
1000651312.korean: 하다못해 우리 우유를 특별하게 보일 방법은 없나?

1000651313.english: It looks special... Oh, just a moment.

1000651314.english: Okay, we found this over there.

1000651315.english: What is it? ... Milk analysis data?

1000651316.english: Analyzing different types of milk and... The efficacy is also written.
1000651316.korean: 여러 종류의 우유를 분석한 거랑... 효능도 적혀 있어.

1000651317.english: Analysis? We're dairy farmers, not researchers, so even if you bring this...
1000651317.korean: 분석? 우리는 연구자가 아니라 낙농업잔데 이런 걸 가져와도-

1000651318.english: ... No, that's not it. Using this, we can promote the excellence of our milk and gain popularity.
1000651318.korean: ...아니지. 이걸 이용하면 우리 우유의 우수함을 알려서 인기를 모을 수 있겠어.

1000651319.english: If our milk sells like hotcakes, it's bound to reach the commander's ears.
1000651319.korean: 우리 우유가 불티나게 나가면 반드시 사령관의 귀에도 들어가겠지.

1000651320.english: Then the commander will also be interested in our milk.
1000651320.korean: 그럼 사령관도 우리 우유에 관심을 가질 거야.

1000651321.english: Okay. Let's find useful information and use it for promotion.
1000651321.korean: 좋아. 쓸만한 정보를 찾아서 홍보할 때 쓰자.

1000651322.english: And for promotional purposes, white milk.

1000651324.english: What are you talking about? When you think of milk, you usually think of white milk, right?
1000651324.korean: 무슨 소리야? 우유하면 보통은 흰 우유지.

1000651326.english: No matter what, milk is still the best.

1000651327.english: ... Wait a minute, I just had a good idea.

1000651328.english: Starting today, for a week, the two milks will compete, and the popular one gets a date with the commander. How is it?
1000651328.korean: 오늘부터 일주일 동안 두 우유로 경쟁하고 인기 있는 쪽이 사령관이랑 데이트. 어때?

1000651329.korean: 데, 데이트. 하지만 같이 협력하는 게...

1000651330.english: What, are you forfeiting? So, I'm going to set up a date?
1000651330.korean: 뭐야, 기권이야? 그럼 나는 데이트 약속 잡으러 간다?

1000651332.english: Okay, okay. Let's do our best! I'll go first.
1000651332.korean: 그래 그래. 잘 해보자~ 먼저 갈게.

1000651335.english: Have a glass of milk. They say just one glass makes you healthier.
1000651335.korean: 우유 한 잔 해~ 한 잔만으로도 건강해진다고.

1000651336.english: Here, take it. Take a big gulp and please vote for me.
1000651336.korean: 자자 받아. 쭈욱 들이키고~ 나한테 한 표 부탁해.

1000651337.english: How about chocolate milk? It's sweet and delicious.

1000651338.english: And one vote for me too...

1000651339.english: - Two elves were bustling in front of the restaurant, showcasing milk.
1000651339.korean: - 두 엘프가 우유를 선보이느라 식당 앞에 북적였다.

1000651340.english: - You seem to be working really hard, what's going on?
1000651340.korean: - 굉장히 열심히 하는 것 같은데 무슨 일이지?

1000651341.english: Oh! Commander. Are you going to eat in the dining hall instead of the captain's cabin?
1000651341.korean: 앗! 사령관. 함장실 말고 식당에서 먹게?

1000651342.english: Okay, drink your milk and get strong.

1000651343.english: You, you! Drink mine too, drink mine too.
1000651343.korean: 다, 당신! 내 것도, 내 것도 마셔.

1000651344.english: - The rich and sweet milky aroma stimulates my hungry stomach, but...
1000651344.korean: - 고소하고 달콤한 우유 향이 주린 배를 자극하지만...

1000651345.english: - Lately, I've been having trouble digesting, so I think drinking milk right now would be a disaster.
1000651345.korean: - 요즘 이상하게 소화가 안돼서 지금 우유를 마시면 큰일이 날 것 같다.

1000651346.english: - I'm sorry for the two of you, but for a while, no milk...
1000651346.korean: - 두 사람에게는 미안하지만 당분간 우유는 좀...

1000651347.english: They say it's good for your health to drink it before you eat.
1000651347.korean: 밥 먹기 전에 마시면 건강에 도움이 된대~

1000651348.english: You can drink chocolate milk anytime, so take it with you.
1000651348.korean: 초코 우유는 언제 마셔도 괜찮으니 들고 가서-

1000651349.english: - Leaving the two of them behind, I moved my feet as if fleeing.
1000651349.korean: - 나는 두 사람을 뒤로 한 채, 도망치다시피 발걸음을 옮겼다.

1000651350.english: Did you avoid our milk? How could this happen...?
1000651350.korean: 우리 우유를 피했어? 어떻게 이런 일이...

1000651351.english: I don't know what's going on, but they've been avoiding me for a few days now.
1000651351.korean: 무슨 일인지 몰라도, 며칠 전부터 피하고 있어.

1000651352.english: Hey, hey, this isn't going to work.

1000651353.english: We'll keep voting, but for now, let's work together.
1000651353.korean: 투표는 계속할 거지만, 당분간은 힘을 합치자.

1000651355.english: Until that person drinks the milk...

1000651357.english: Orangeade's Radio, Orca Live! Today's guests are the people who have recently brought a fresh breeze to the Orca.
1000651357.korean: "오렌지에이드의 라디오, 오르카 라이브!" 오늘 게스트는 최근 오르카 호에 새로운 바람을 일으킨 분들이죠.

1000651358.english: We will serve the Elven and Dark Elven lords! Wow!

1000651359.english: Hello~ Please keep supporting white milk.

1000651361.english: You must be busy with the election, so thank you so much for taking the time to be here!
1000651361.korean: 투표 때문에 바쁘실 텐데~ 이렇게 자리해 주셔서 정말 고마워요!

1000651362.english: Since the two of you promoted milk as being good for diet, beauty, and health, there's been a milk craze on the Orca.
1000651362.korean: 두 분께서 우유가 다이어트, 미용, 건강에 좋다고 홍보하신 이후로 오르카 호에 우유 열풍이 불었어요.

1000651363.english: I wanted to tell you about the many benefits of milk. Well, we've gotten busy.
1000651363.korean: 우유는 많은 장점이 있으니까 알려주고 싶었어. 뭐~ 우리는 바빠졌지만.

1000651364.english: I also need to count the votes, but I don't know if I'll have time...
1000651364.korean: 투표 집계도 해야 하는데, 시간이 날까...

1000651365.english: The voting results are finally coming out!

1000651366.english: But is there any particular reason why you decided to vote?
1000651366.korean: 그런데 투표를 하게 된 특별한 이유라도 있을까요?

1000651367.english: We decided to have a contest to see which of the two milks is more popular.
1000651367.korean: 둘 중에서 인기 있는 우유가 무엇인지 승부하기로 했거든.

1000651369.english: Plain, smooth white milk is so delicious with bread!
1000651369.korean: 담백하고 부드러운 흰 우유는 빵이랑 먹으면 얼마나 맛있는데요!

1000651370.english: But on cold days, it's also nice to snuggle under the covers and relax with a warm chocolate milk.
1000651370.korean: 하지만 추운 날에는 이불 덮고, 따뜻한 초코 우유를 마시면서 푹 쉬는 것도 좋죠~

1000651371.english: I'll have to try both of those when I rest today~ Hehe!
1000651371.korean: 오늘 쉴 때 둘 다 해봐야지~ 헤헷!

1000651372.english: I liked both of them and had a hard time choosing, but I'm sure others made good choices, right?
1000651372.korean: 저는 둘 다 마음에 들어서 선택하기 어려웠지만, 다른 분들은 잘 선택하셨겠죠?

1000651373.english: So, are there any bets or promises involved in this match?
1000651373.korean: 그렇다면 승부에 혹시 내기라던가 약속이라던가 있을까요?

1000651374.english: Ah, the person who wins between the two-

1000651375.english: Hey! That, that's a secret... I can't say...
1000651375.korean: 야! 그, 그건 비밀이라... 말 못 해...

1000651376.english: I don't mind if you say it, but...

1000651377.english: That's a shame. Please feel free to tell me anytime you feel like talking about it in the future!
1000651377.korean: 그건 아쉽네요~ 다음에 말하고 싶어질 때, 언제든지 말씀해 주세요!

1000651378.english: Oh, a question! Do you have a reason for being dedicated to milk? Yes, please provide an answer.
1000651378.korean: 앗, 질문이! "여러분이 우유에 헌신하는 이유라도 있으나요?" 네, 답변 부탁드립니다~

1000651379.english: For us, milk is... It's about pride.

1000651380.english: They do everything themselves, from growing feed crops to managing dairy cows and making milk.
1000651380.korean: 먹이용 초목부터 젖소 관리, 우유 제조까지 모두 직접 하거든.

1000651381.english: If they couldn't even do dairy farming properly, they might have ended up living in the mountains their whole lives, just looking at grass.
1000651381.korean: 낙농업도 제대로 못하면, 평생 산속에서 풀만 보며 살기도 했으니까.

1000651382.english: Still, it's in the past, and I've never experienced it, so I don't care.
1000651382.korean: 그래도 옛날 일이기도 하고, 겪어본 적도 없으니 신경 안 써.

1000651383.english: More importantly, when is the promised promotional time?

1000651385.english: Now, after the two of you have your milk promotion time, we'll continue with the questions.
1000651385.korean: 지금부터 두 분의 우유 홍보 시간을 가진 뒤에, 마저 질문하도록 하죠.

1000651386.english: I'll also tell you about the effects and how to use it, which you've been curious about, so pay close attention!
1000651386.korean: 여러분이 궁금해하신 효능이나 응용 방법도 알려드릴 테니, 집중 집중!

1000651387.english: - The radio program I listened to yesterday is playing in my head.

1000651388.english: - Seeing how much they were promoting it, I do want to try it...
1000651388.korean: - 그렇게까지 홍보하던 걸 보면 나도 마시고는 싶은데...

1000651390.english: - I keep feeling like I can't digest my food... When will I feel better?
1000651390.korean: - 계속 소화가 안되는 기분인데... 언제쯤 괜찮아지려나.

1000651391.english: - Looking at the milk situation, there were no unusual findings.

1000651392.english: - Then what could be the reason for that...?

1000651393.english: - As I was thinking that to myself, the door suddenly burst open and Elven, you came looking for me.
1000651393.korean: - 그렇게 혼자 생각하고 있을 때, 벌컥 하고 문이 열리며 엘븐 네가 찾아왔다.

1000651394.english: Seeing the large milk containers, it seems the two were in the middle of processing milk.
1000651394.korean: - 큰 우유 용기를 보아하니 두 사람은 한창 우유를 가공하던 중이었나 보다.

1000651396.english: The vote resulted in a tie, which is quite troublesome... I should take a break.
1000651396.korean: 투표 결과로 동점이 나와서 곤란한 참인데... 좀 쉬어야지~

1000651397.english: A revote is a bit... Do you have any good ideas?
1000651397.korean: 재투표하는 건 좀... 당신, 좋은 생각이 있어?

1000651399.english: - I handed him the document detailing the status of the stored milk and asked.
1000651399.korean: - 나는 저장된 우유 현황 조사 문서를 건네며 물었다.

1000651400.english: - The two people looked at each other and started laughing.
1000651400.korean: - 두 사람은 서로의 눈을 마주치고는 웃기 시작했다.

1000651402.english: If I had known it would turn out like this, I should have just said it myself.
1000651402.korean: 이럴 줄 알았으면 그냥 직접 말할 걸 그랬네.

1000651403.english: - After laughing for a long time, the two of them looked at me again.
1000651403.korean: - 두 사람은 한참을 웃고 난 후, 다시 나를 쳐다보았다.

1000651404.english: Hey. Commander, it seems you've been avoiding milk lately.
1000651404.korean: 있잖아. 사령관~ 요즘 따라 우유를 피하는 것 같은데.

1000651405.english: Since you avoid milk... I wanted you to drink some milk.
1000651405.korean: 당신이 우유를 피하니까... 우유를 마셨으면 해서.

1000651406.english: Perhaps you're tired of our milk...

1000651407.english: - The two people smile as if relieved upon hearing my answer.
1000651407.korean: - 두 사람은 내 대답을 듣고 안심하는 듯한 미소를 짓는다.

1000651408.english: Then why haven't you been drinking it until now?

1000651409.english: - It's better to be honest than to be misunderstood, right?
1000651409.korean: - 오해를 사는 것보다 솔직하게 말하는 편이 좋겠지.

1000651412.english: - The two people handed over mugs filled with white milk and chocolate milk.
1000651412.korean: - 두 사람은 흰 우유와 초코 우유를 담은 머그컵을 건넸다.

1000651413.english: I asked my adjutant, and... They say you have trouble digesting.
1000651413.korean: 부관에게 물어보니... 당신, 소화가 잘 안되는 것 같대.

1000651414.english: So, I tried making milk that's easy to digest. How about this? Is this okay?
1000651414.korean: 그래서 소화가 잘 되는 우유를 만들어 봤어. 어때, 이거면 괜찮지?

1000651415.english: Even if it's just out of consideration for our sincerity, do we have to drink all the milk we made?
1000651415.korean: 성의를 봐서라도 우리가 만든 우유는 다 마셔줘야 해?

1000651416.english: - The mug is gently warm, so it seems to have been heated just right for drinking.
1000651416.korean: - 머그컵은 은은하게 따뜻한 것이 마시기 좋게 데운 것 같다.

1000651417.english: - Slowly pour the white milk down. A clean, simple taste, so much so that it could be described as "pure."
1000651417.korean: - 천천히 흰 우유를 털어 넘긴다. 깨끗하다고 표현해야 할 정도로 군더더기 없이 담백한 맛.

1000651418.english: - Then, I drink chocolate milk too. The perfect balance of sweetness, not too sweet or bland, lingers in your mouth.
1000651418.korean: - 이어서 초코 우유도 마신다. 너무 달지도, 밋밋하지 않은 적당한 단맛이 입안에서 맴돈다.

1000651420.english: That's a relief. Then I'll follow along more.

1000651421.english: - Okay. Let's drink a little more-

1000651422.english: Huh? I said 'the milk we made', didn't I?

1000651423.english: - The cold sweat running down my back gives me a chilling feeling.
1000651423.korean: - 등에 흐르는 식은땀에 섬뜩한 느낌이 든다.

1000651424.english: I'll fill your glass to the brim.

1000651425.english: - As the mug fills up, my heart also fills with increasing anxiety.
1000651425.korean: - 머그컵이 차오를수록 내 마음도 점점 불안함으로 차오른다.

1000651426.english: Would you like white milk or chocolate milk? Which one is better?
1000651426.korean: 당신은 흰 우유와 초코 우유 중에서... 어느 게 더 좋아?

1000651427.english: That's that, and this is this. This is a matter of pride for both of us, isn't it?
1000651427.korean: 그건 그거고, 이건 이거. 우리 둘의 자존심이 걸린 문제인걸?

1000651428.english: Since it's a tie, Commander, take your time and think about it.
1000651428.korean: 마침 동점이니까~ 사령관, 천천히 생각해 봐.

1000651429.english: You're still not enough, are you? I'll get more from the warehouse.
1000651429.korean: 당신, 아직 부족하지? 창고에서 더 가져올게.

1000651430.english: Commander, we still have plenty of milk... Let's keep drinking until we decide?
1000651430.korean: 사령관, 우유는 아직 많이 남았으니까... 결정할 때까지 계속 마시자?

1000651432.english: If I just finish what I'm drawing now and get it confirmed by the client...!
1000651432.korean: 지금 그리는 것만 끝내고 의뢰자 분께 확인만 받으면...!

1000651433.english: Ahaha... I'll just draw the next client's request right away.
1000651433.korean: 아하하... 곧바로 다음 의뢰자분 요청대로 그리면 되겠네요.

1000651434.english: It doesn't seem to be decreasing at all~

1000651435.english: Haa... It's still piled up like a mountain.

1000651436.english: Since I came here, requests have suddenly been pouring in...
1000651436.korean: 이곳에 오고 난 뒤부터 갑자기 요청이 밀려들고 있고...

1000651437.english: I'd like to see what's in the information storage area... At this rate, I won't even be able to leave the room.
1000651437.korean: 정보 보관 구역에 뭐가 있는지 보고 싶은데... 이래서는 방 밖으로도 나가지 못하겠어요.

1000651438.english: Mery, are you in the room? Wow... Are you okay? It's in terrible condition.
1000651438.korean: 메리, 방에 있- 우와... 괜찮아? 상태가 말이 아닌데.

1000651439.english: It's okay. It's just that there's a lot of work.

1000651440.english: Ms. Bavaria, are you applying for a commission again this time?
1000651440.korean: 바바리아나 씨, 이번에도 커미션 신청하시려는 거죠?

1000651441.english: Yeah, I got a lot of inspiration this time. And I also want to see Mery's paintings.
1000651441.korean: 그래, 이번에 많은 영감을 얻어서 말이야. 그리고 메리의 그림이 보고 싶은 것도 있고.

1000651442.english: Hehe. Thank you. How would you like me to draw it this time?

1000651443.english: I saw something decent in the information storage area, and it was... How should I explain it?
1000651443.korean: 정보 보관 구역에서 괜찮은 걸 봤는데, 그게 음... 어떻게 설명해야 하지.

1000651444.english: I'll pose for you. I sit like this, and my arms are like this...
1000651444.korean: 직접 포즈를 취해볼게. 내가 이런 식으로 걸터앉고, 팔은 이렇게...

1000651445.english: That's a relatively ordinary sitting posture, isn't it?

1000651446.english: Really? The commander is lying down with his legs stretched out in my arms, his hips pressed against mine.
1000651446.korean: 그래? 사령관은 다리를 내 팔 안으로 뻗은 채로 누워서, 나와 엉덩이를 맞대고 있는 거야.

1000651447.english: Hmm. This time it's another unusual pose... What kind of feeling are you going for with this?
1000651447.korean: 으음. 이번에도 특이한 자세인데... 이건 어떤 느낌을 원하시는 건가요?

1000651448.english: The leader is always being overwhelmed by me, completely helpless.
1000651448.korean: 항상 리드하는 자가 내게 굴복당한 채, 속수무책으로 당하는 모습.

1000651449.english: I'm curious to see the commander in such a state at least once.
1000651449.korean: 한 번쯤은 사령관의 이런 모습도 보고 싶다는 호기심이지만.

1000651450.english: By the way, Mery, is there anything you want to see or wish for?
1000651450.korean: 그러고 보니, 메리는 보고 싶은 거라던가 원하는 거라던가 있어?

1000651451.english: I, I... want to sleep soundly for a day...
1000651451.korean: 저, 저는... 하루 동안 푹 자고 싶어요...

1000651452.english: Haha. That definitely sounds necessary, but besides that, what do you want with the commander?
1000651452.korean: 하핫. 확실히 필요해 보이지만 그거 말고 사령관하고 원하는 것 말이야.

1000651453.english: With my older brother... well... ah...

1000651456.english: Master! I thought you would be here soon.

1000651457.english: Hmm. I was passing by and overheard an interesting conversation.
1000651457.korean: 음. 지나가는데 흥미로운 이야기가 들려서 말이지.

1000651458.english: So, Mery, can you tell me what you want to do with the commander?
1000651458.korean: 그래서 메리 양은 사령관하고 무얼 하고 싶은지 말해 줄 수 있겠나?

1000651459.english: E-even if what I want is really ordinary... it might be boring.
1000651459.korean: 그, 그래도 제가 원하는 건 정말 평범해서... 재미없을 수도 있어요.

1000651460.english: Even if your feelings for your loved one are ordinary or special, does it really matter?
1000651460.korean: 사랑하는 사람을 향한 마음이 평범하다 해도, 특별하다 해도 문제 될 게 있겠나?

1000651462.english: What matters in the heart is not how fun it is,

1000651463.english: but how sincere that heart is.

1000651464.english: Right. The master said that loving with all your might is important.
1000651464.korean: 그래. 혼신의 힘을 다해 사랑하는 게 중요하다고 스승님이 말했잖아.

1000651465.english: I-I see. It might seem a little childish, but... umm.
1000651465.korean: 그, 그럼. 조금 유치해 보일 수도 있지만... 으음.

1000651466.english: I want to walk quietly with my older brother down a tree-lined path. Just peacefully.
1000651466.korean: 저는 오라버니와 조용한 가로수 길을 걷고 싶어요. 그냥 평화롭게.

1000651467.english: Holding my brother's hand leisurely, not caring about anything, just feeling each other's touch...
1000651467.korean: 오라버니의 손을 잡으며 여유롭게, 아무것도 신경 쓰지 않고 서로의 손길을 느끼고...

1000651468.english: And then holding both hands, looking into each other's eyes... and whispering "I love you."
1000651468.korean: 그리고 두 손을 마주 잡고 두 눈을 맞추며... 사랑한다고 속삭이고 싶어요.

1000651469.english: Haha. You held him for a long time before too.

1000651470.english: Ah... Commander, that was... we got carried away by the mood...
1000651470.korean: 아으. 대장님 그건... 분위기에 휘말려서 어쩌다 보니...

1000651471.english: Is that so? I wanted to invite you to this gathering as well, but it can't be helped.
1000651471.korean: 그런가? 이번 모임에도 초대하려고 했다만 어쩔 수 없지.

1000651474.english: Good. I can learn again this time.

1000651475.english: I, um... I want to come too, Commander.
1000651475.korean: 저, 저기... 저도... 가고 싶어요. 대장님.

1000651476.english: Haha. Be honest with your feelings.

1000651477.english: This was also a pose I wanted to try for the picture you requested. See it firsthand and draw it well.
1000651477.korean: 마침 부탁한 그림도 시험해 보고 싶은 자세였으니까. 직접 보고 잘 그려줘.

1000651478.english: Try it? What kind of pose is it?
1000651478.korean: 그런데 시험해 보고 싶은 자세라니, 어떤 자세인가?

1000651479.english: I just did a rough sketch based on what Bavaria said.
1000651479.korean: 방금 바바리아나 씨가 말한 대로 러프 스케치만 해봤는데요.

1000651480.english: It feels like this. I haven't quite understood it yet, but...
1000651480.korean: 이런 느낌이네요. 아직 제대로 이해하지 못했지만...

1000651481.english: Hmm. If we do it like this, we can face the commander from a new perspective.
1000651481.korean: 음. 이런 식으로 하면, 새로운 시점에서 사령관을 마주 볼 수 있겠어.

1000651482.english: Since it's come to this, how about we go now?
1000651482.korean: 이왕 이렇게 된 거. 지금 가보는 건 어떨까요?

1000651483.english: That sounds good. I can't stand my curiosity.
1000651483.korean: 그거 좋지. 궁금한 건 참지 못하는 성격이라서 말이야.

1000651484.english: Will you come too? I think it's a chance to understand the feeling.
1000651484.korean: 자네도 같이 가겠나? 어떤 느낌인지 이해할 기회라고 생각한다만.

1000651485.english: Me? I, well... I still have a lot to do—eh!
1000651485.korean: 네? 저요? 그, 그게... 아직 해야 할 일이 많은데- 꺗!

1000651486.english: Come here. We have plenty of time, so take a breather~
1000651486.korean: 자, 이리와. 아직 시간은 많으니까 한숨 좀 돌리자고~

1000651487.english: At least some preparation... I'm a bit embarrassed to show you myself like this...
1000651487.korean: 최소한의 준비라도... 지금 제 모습을 보여드리기는 좀 부끄러워서...

1000651488.english: Haha. Showing yourself as you are is also good.
1000651488.korean: 하핫. 있는 그대로의 모습을 보여주는 것도 좋아.

1000651489.english: And the commander will like you no matter what, so don't worry.
1000651489.korean: 그리고 사령관은 자네가 어떤 모습이든지 좋아할 테니 걱정하지 말게.

1000651490.english: I-I see... should we try going like this?
1000651490.korean: 그, 그럼... 한 번 이대로 가볼...까요?

1000651491.english: It seems the commission requests are increasing, should I stay up all night again this time...
1000651491.korean: 점점 커미션 요청이 늘어나는 것 같은데 이번에도 밤을 새워야 하나...

1000651492.english: Y-yeah... but it feels a bit better after a short break then.
1000651492.korean: 그, 그래도... 그때 한숨을 돌려서 좀 나은 것 같네요.

1000651493.english: Mery. Is it okay if Zero comes in?

1000651495.english: Excuse me, but you look pale. Are you getting enough sleep?
1000651495.korean: 실례하지. 그런데 안색이 나빠 보인다만 잠은 제대로 자는 건가?

1000651496.english: Ahaha... I'm fine. What is it?

1000651497.english: I heard if I come here, you'll draw a picture for me...

1000651498.english: Are you also applying for a commission, Zero-san?

1000651499.english: Then... I hope you will draw the beautiful figure of the Lord.
1000651499.korean: 그럼... 주공의 아름다운 자태를 그려주길 바란다.

1000651500.english: Of course! But could you tell me more details?

1000651501.english: Any expressions you'd like to use, or what you felt when you saw your older brother...
1000651501.korean: 원하시는 표현이라던가, 오라버니를 보고 느끼신 점이라던가…

1000651502.english: Huhu... What I felt after seeing the main character...

1000651503.english: ... The Lord is as smooth as finely crafted porcelain, yet his skin is as soft and warm as cotton.
1000651503.korean: ...주공은, 곱게 빚은 자기처럼 매끄럽지만 목화솜처럼 부드럽고 따스한 살결을 가지고 있사와요.

1000651504.english: Her two eyes were as large and brilliant as the full moon reflected in a lake, and infinitely deep, so deep you could never escape...
1000651504.korean: 두 눈망울은 호수에 비친 만월처럼 크고 찬란하며 헤어 나오지 못할 만큼 한없이 깊고...

1000651505.english: The jaw is like a razor-sharp blade that dares not be touched, yet it possesses the mystery of cutting thru nothing.
1000651505.korean: 턱은 감히 손댈 수 없을 정도로 예리한 칼날과 같으나, 그 무엇도 베어내지 않는 신비함을 갖추었사와요.

1000651506.english: And when he hugs me, it feels like the surroundings turn purple, as if violets are in full bloom...!"
1000651506.korean: 그리고 저를 끌어안을 때는 마치 제비꽃이 만개하듯 주변이 자색으로 물드는 듯한 기분이…!

1000651507.english: Hmm. I just couldn't help myself...

1000651508.english: The explanation was sufficient, right? If it wasn't enough, please add a little more.
1000651508.korean: 설명은 충분했겠지? 혹여나 부족했다면 좀 더-

1000651510.english: Smooth skin, bright, large eyes, a sharp jawline, and surrounded by purple violets...
1000651510.korean: 매끄러운 피부, 초롱초롱하고 큰 눈, 날카로운 턱 선에 주변에는 보라색 제비꽃...

1000651511.english: I drew it as you said, and I'm-

1000651512.english: The image of the Lord that I had in mind was exactly as I imagined it! Oh. Just a moment...
1000651512.korean: 생각한 주공의 모습이 그대로...! 앗. 잠시…

1000651513.english: It would be good to change this part a little. Make the eyes bigger and the jawline sharper...
1000651513.korean: 이쪽 부분을 조금 바꾸면 좋겠군. 눈은 더 키우고 턱도 더 날카롭게...

1000651514.english: Is it like a shoujo manga? If you do this here...
1000651514.korean: 순정 만화 느낌인가... 여기를 이렇게 하면...

1000651515.english: Ah... The Lord's beautiful figure is appearing...!
1000651515.korean: 아아... 주공의 아름다운 자태가 나타나고 있사와요...!

1000651516.english: Hehe. Then I'll just keep drawing it like this-

1000651517.english: This is... not the Lord of the Manor.

1000651518.english: Kyaaah! Ka, Kaen-san, where did you come from this time...?
1000651518.korean: 꺄앗! 카, 카엔 씨는 또 어디서...

1000651519.english: Even tho you're my older sister, I can't let that comment slide.
1000651519.korean: 아무리 언니라도 방금 그 발언은 넘어갈 수 없어요.

1000651520.korean: 주공... 카엔을, 따뜻하게 안아, 꼬옥 하고.

1000651521.english: However, the appearance of the Lord... It's not like that.

1000651522.english: With skin as smooth as white jade, clear and transparent eyes, and a sharp jawline.
1000651522.korean: 백옥같이 매끄러운 피부에 맑고 투명한 눈망울, 날카로운 턱 선까지.

1000651523.english: Who else could it be but the Lord?

1000651524.english: The master's eyes are big... Still, half my face, no.
1000651524.korean: 주공의 눈, 커... 그래도, 얼굴의 절반, 아냐.

1000651525.english: And my chin... It's not sharp like a knife.

1000651526.english: Ahaha... Pictures can be exaggerated compared to reality.

1000651527.english: Things look different to a girl in love. Sister.
1000651527.korean: 연심에 빠진 소녀에게는 다르게 보이는 법이에요. 언니.

1000651528.english: Does your eye hurt? Get treatment.

1000651529.english: And today... Kaen, alone, to the Lord.

1000651530.english: Sister! You two said you would assist the Lord, and yet...

1000651533.english: Haa... Then, what did you see when you looked at the main character?
1000651533.korean: 하아... 그렇다면 언니가 본 주공의 모습은 어떻죠?

1000651534.english: Um, excuse me... so, how about the painting?

1000651535.english: Kaen, when you're held by the master, I can see the rapeseed flowers... Many rapeseed flowers.
1000651535.korean: 카엔, 주공에게 안기면, 유채꽃이 보여... 많은 유채꽃.

1000651536.english: Violets are blooming for the master. Violet.

1000651537.english: And the Duke said he liked violets. Sister.
1000651537.korean: 그리고 주공은 제비꽃이 좋다고 말했어요. 언니.

1000651540.english: Only violets can match the pure and mysterious appearance of the Lord.
1000651540.korean: 주공의 정갈하고 신비한 모습에는 오직 제비꽃만 어울릴 수 있어요.

1000651542.english: Master... Like rapeseed flowers, so gentle... And it's warm.

1000651545.english: Why are you doing this to me...?

1000651548.english: Wouldn't the other kids know better than me?
1000651548.korean: 나 말고 다른 애들이 더 잘 알지 않을까?

1000651551.english: Shall we try doing something, at least?

1000651552.english: Gasp. Just a moment... Can't I just lie down and rest?

1000651553.english: Wow, this is what exercise is like?

1000651555.english: Sorry. I'll drink it after I eat.

1000651556.english: Good luck to both of you!

1000651558.english: But why are they suddenly promoting it?

1000651559.english: Sorry, nothing really comes to mind.

1000651560.english: I'm curious why they're suddenly promoting milk.

1000651561.english: Is there a problem I don't know about?
1000651561.korean: 혹시 내가 모르는 문제라도 있는 거야?

1000651563.english: No. You really like Elven Milk, don't you?

1000651564.english: That's... I've been having trouble with digestion lately.
1000651564.korean: 그게... 최근에 소화가 잘 안돼서 말이야.

1000651565.english: A drink or two is fine.

1000651567.english: Maybe because it's warm there, but I feel like my stomach is at ease.
1000651567.korean: 거기에 따뜻해서 그런지, 속이 편한 기분이야.

1000651568.english: Wait a minute, I finished everything in the mug...
1000651568.korean: 잠깐만, 머그컵에 있는 건 다 마셨는데...

1000651569.english: Choice... Do I have to? I love all Elven Milk...
1000651569.korean: 선택... 해야 해? 나 엘븐 밀크는 전부 좋아하는데...

1000651573.english: Preparations for docking are complete, Your Majesty.

1000651574.english: At Armand's words, I took my eyes off the tactical map and stood up from my seat.
1000651574.korean: - 아르망의 말에 전술지도에서 눈을 떼고 자리에서 일어났다.

1000651575.english: There are a few Iron Bugs, but they are not a main force.
1000651575.korean: 철충들이 약간 있지만 주력급 부대는 아니에요.

1000651576.english: As Alpha manipulated the panel, the surrounding situation on the tactical map was updated by the scouting party.
1000651576.korean: - 알파가 패널을 조작하자 전술지도에 정찰대에 의해 주변 상황이 업데이트 됐다.

1000651577.english: What would you like to do?

1000651578.english: At Alpha's question, I recalled what Eva had said a while ago.
1000651578.korean: - 알파의 물음에 얼마 전 에바의 말을 떠올렸다.

1000651580.english: Commander, head to the Svalbard Islands via the Arctic Ocean immediately.
1000651580.korean: 사령관, 당신은 지금 즉시 북극해를 통해 스발바르 제도로 향하세요.

1000651581.english: There are several reasons, but first of all, that place is the safest place in the world for the resistance at this point.
1000651581.korean: 몇 가지 이유가 있는데, 일단 그곳은 현 시점에서 저항군에게 세상에서 가장 안전한 곳이에요.

1000651582.english: Since you stirred up America like that, Omega won't just sit idly by, right?
1000651582.korean: 아메리카를 그렇게 들쑤셔 놨으니, 오메가가 가만히 있지는 않겠죠?

1000651583.english: And there is also the 'Ark of Memory' there. It is a place where all of history is preserved, from the time humanity began the act of recording until its extinction. Finally…
1000651583.korean: 그리고 거기엔 '기억의 방주'도 있어요. 인류가 기록이라는 행위를 시작했을 때부터, 멸망하기 전까지의 모든 역사가 보관된 곳이죠. 마지막으로…

1000651586.english: Given our current situation, a new base is necessary even if it is not necessarily Eva's suggestion.
1000651586.korean: - 우리의 현 상황을 감안해 봤을 때, 꼭 에바의 말이 아니더라도 새로운 거점은 필요하다.

1000651587.english: - The last remark bothers me, though…

1000651589.english: am primarily searching through the remaining records, but it seems the terrain has changed a bit over time.
1000651589.korean: 남아있는 기록을 통해 우선적으로 찾아보는 중인데, 시간이 오래 흘러 지형이 조금 바뀐 것 같아요.

1000651591.english: A place where all of human history is preserved... it's a bit hard to imagine.
1000651591.korean: - 인류의 모든 역사가 보관된 곳이라... 조금 상상이 안되는걸.

1000651592.english: You said the Ark of Memory was made by Watcher of Nature, right?
1000651592.korean: - 기억의 방주는 와쳐 오브 네이쳐에서 만들었다고 했었지?

1000651594.english: The Ark of Memory stores ALL information—that is, everything from academic research materials to recent updates someone posted on social media in the past.
1000651594.korean: 기억의 방주에는 모~든 정보, 그러니까 학술적 연구 자료부터 과거에 누군가가 SNS에 올린 근황 글까지 전부 보관되어 있어요.

1000651595.english: As soon as I arrived at the captain's quarters after receiving the call, Ella hugged me and explained earnestly.
1000651595.korean: - 호출을 받고 함장실로 오자마자 내 품에 안긴 엘라가 열심히 설명했다.

1000651596.english: Wasn't it just a simple research institute...

1000651597.english: Not only that... there will be all the genetic information for almost every species of organism and bioroid that ever existed.
1000651597.korean: 그, 그것뿐만이 아니라... 존재했었던 거의 모든 종의 생물과 바이오로이드의 유전 정보도 전부 있을 거예요.

1000651598.english: Seti, who was being held by me on the opposite side of Ella, also added an explanation.
1000651598.korean: - 엘라 반대편에서 내게 안겨있는 세띠도 설명을 덧붙였다.

1000651599.english: Actually, while information is important, what I, and we, are most interested in is precisely that.
1000651599.korean: - 사실 정보도 정보지만 내가, 그리고 우리가 가장 관심이 있는 것은 바로 그것.

1000651600.english: Due to powerful enemies, the resistance force I lead is always suffering from a shortage of power, and…
1000651600.korean: - 강대한 적들 때문에 내가 이끄는 저항군은 언제나 전력 부족에 시달리고 있고…

1000651601.english: If we can obtain genetic information for new bioroids from the Ark of Memories, it would be a great help.
1000651601.korean: - 기억의 방주에서 새로운 바이오로이드들의 유전 정보를 얻을 수 있다면, 큰 도움이 되겠지.

1000651602.english: Ah, then would Mnemosyne be there too?

1000651603.english: I am a facility manager assigned one by one to the Ark of Memory.
1000651603.korean: 기억의 방주에 한 명씩 배치되는 시설 관리인이야.

1000651604.english: To think you've been doing the exact same thing in one place for decades... I can't even imagine.
1000651604.korean: 수십 년 동안 한 곳에서 똑같은 일만 한다니. 나는 상상도 못하겠어.

1000651606.english: Hmm... Their personality is closer to that of a robot than us. Cold, aloof, and noble.
1000651606.korean: 으음... 저희보다는 로봇에 가까운 성격이에요. 차갑고, 냉정하고, 고고한.

1000651607.english: - Searched the internal database to find information about Mnemosyne.
1000651607.korean: - 내부 데이터베이스를 검색해 므네모시네에 대한 정보를 검색했다.

1000651608.english: Fortunately, I was able to find some superficial data.
1000651608.korean: - 다행히 피상적인 데이터는 찾아낼 수 있었다.

1000651609.english: It was designed to guard the ark alone for its entire lifespan, and to pass on its role to the next Mnemosyne when its lifespan ended.
1000651609.korean: 기대 수명 내내 홀로 방주를 지키고, 수명이 다하면 다음 므네모시네에게 역할을 넘기도록 만들어졌거든요.

1000651610.english: ...Ms. Caroline Foster probably couldn't have helped it either.
1000651610.korean: ...캐롤린 포스터 님도 어쩔 수 없었을 거예요.

1000651612.english: gently stroked Setti's hair, who looked sullen as if empathizing with her.
1000651612.korean: - 감정을 이입했는지 시무룩해진 세띠의 머리카락을 조심조심 쓰다듬어 주었다.

1000651613.english: But why did they go out of their way to create bioroids?

1000651614.english: They could have just automated everything, or at least hired a management AI.
1000651614.korean: 그냥 전부 자동화하거나, 하다못해 관리 A.I.를 두면 됐을 텐데.

1000651615.english: I can just meet them and ask, I guess. It looks like the reconnaissance is wrapping up soon anyway.
1000651615.korean: 만나서 물어보면 되지, 뭐. 슬슬 정찰도 끝나가는 것 같고.

1000651616.english: As soon as the Empress finished speaking, a report came in that the reconnaissance was over and preparations for unloading the cargo were complete.
1000651616.korean: - 엠프리스의 말이 끝나자마자 정찰이 끝났고, 화물을 하역할 준비도 마쳤다는 보고가 들어왔다.

1000651618.english: Leave it to me. This kind of place is my specialty!

1000651619.english: Ah, I feel good. It's been so long since I've been in the snow!
1000651619.korean: 아~ 기분 좋다. 이게 얼마 만에 눈밭이야~

1000651620.english: Joe, it feels a little cold. Is Ella okay?
1000651620.korean: 조, 조금 추운 것 같은데 엘라는 괜찮아요?

1000651621.english: It's still okay. Still, I'll need to rest a bit after finding the Ark...
1000651621.korean: 아직은 괜찮아. 그래도 방주를 찾고 나면 좀 쉬어야겠어...

1000651622.english: Ella, you're really in trouble being so weak.
1000651622.korean: 엘라 너 진짜 그렇게 몸 약해서 큰일이다.

1000651623.english: A strong body is one of the essential requirements for an attractive lady, you know! Okay, let's run together.
1000651623.korean: 튼튼한 몸은 매력적인 숙녀의 필수 조건 중 하나라구! 자, 나랑 같이 뛰자.

1000651624.english: I just like staying in my room, drinking cocoa, and playing board games...
1000651624.korean: 나는 그냥 방에서 코코아 마시면서 보드게임 하는 게 좋은데에...

1000651625.english: That's why I always do it with you! Sometimes, please accommodate my hobbies too!
1000651625.korean: 그래서 맨날 내가 같이 해주잖아! 가끔씩은 내 취미에도 맞춰달라구!

1000651627.english: Oh. There, I see the entrance to the ark.

1000651628.english: Oh, you're right. The scouts have cleared some snow from the entrance.
1000651628.korean: 오, 진짜네. 정찰대 녀석들이 입구에 눈을 좀 치워놨구나.

1000651630.english: We've only walked a little bit, and you're already tired!

1000651631.english: - Not long after the Watcher of Nature departed, we received word that it had arrived at the entrance to the Ark.
1000651631.korean: - 와쳐 오브 네이쳐가 출발한 지 얼마 지나지 않아 방주 입구에 도착했다는 연락이 들어왔다.

1000651632.english: - However, the entrance was firmly closed, and upon hearing that human authentication was required, I arrived at the ark with my escort.
1000651632.korean: - 다만 입구는 굳게 닫혀있고, 인간의 인증이 필요하다는 말에 호위와 함께 방주에 도착했다.

1000651633.english: The ark was built for a time far in the future when human civilization would decline.
1000651633.korean: 방주는 먼 미래에 인간의 문명이 쇠락했을 때를 위해 지어졌으니까.

1000651634.english: It would be strange if the humans who survived back then came to rebuild civilization but couldn't enter because they didn't have the authority, wouldn't it?
1000651634.korean: 그때 살아남은 인간이 문명을 재건하려고 찾아왔는데, 권한 없다고 못들어가면 이상하잖아?

1000651636.english: - Pretending to give Empress a playful tap on the head and placing his hand on the entrance panel, the door that had endured long years alone slowly opened.
1000651636.korean: - 엠프리스의 머리에 꿀밤을 먹이는 시늉을 하며 입구 패널에 손을 얹자, 긴 세월을 홀로 견뎌낸 문이 천천히 열렸다.

1000651638.english: - After sending the advance party in first and receiving the signal that it was safe, I also entered the hallway.
1000651638.korean: - 선발대를 먼저 들여보내고 안전하다는 신호를 받은 후, 나도 복도로 들어섰다.

1000651639.english: I'm sorry, I'm sorry. I'm a little scared...

1000651641.english: Hmph, it's just dark. What's the big deal about this much- Hyaaaah?!
1000651641.korean: 헹, 그냥 어두울 뿐이잖아. 이정도로 뭐가- 햣?!

1000651642.english: - Startled by the sound of dripping water, the Empress jumped and clung tightly to my back.
1000651642.korean: - 물방울이 떨어지는 소리에 놀란 엠프리스가 펄쩍 뛰곤 내 등에 찰싹 달라붙었다.

1000651643.english: - Now accustomed to it, the combined robot continued walking in its form with the members hanging from its arms and torso.
1000651643.korean: - 이젠 익숙해진, 양팔과 몸통에 대원들을 주렁주렁 매단 합체로봇 form으로 계속 걸음을 옮겼다.

1000651644.english: - The hallway seemed to brighten little by little, and soon a space like the lobby of an old castle appeared.
1000651644.korean: - 복도가 조금씩 밝아지는가 싶더니, 곧 오래된 성의 로비 같은 공간이 나타났다.

1000651648.english: - Inside the lobby, a woman appeared like a mirage.
1000651648.korean: - 로비 안쪽에서 한 여성이 신기루처럼 나타났다.

1000651651.english: - Mnemosyne, who had bowed her head from afar, slowly approached us.
1000651651.korean: - 멀리서 꾸벅 고개를 숙인 므네모시네는 천천히 우리 앞으로 다가왔다.

1000651652.english: Welcome to the Ark of Memory.

1000651653.english: The recognition name of this entity is Mnemosyne, and it is responsible for the maintenance and management of this ark.
1000651653.korean: 본 개체의 인식명은 므네모시네, 본 방주의 유지와 관리를 맡고 있습니다.

1000651654.english: - With a mineral expression, Mnemosyne bowed her head again and extended her hand.
1000651654.korean: - 무기질한 표정으로 재차 꾸벅 고개를 숙인 므네모시네는 손을 내밀었다.

1000651655.english: We are initiating procedures to acquire all rights to this entity and the right to view the corresponding ark.
1000651655.korean: 본 개체에 대한 모든 권리 및 해당 방주의 열람 권한 획득을 위한 절차를 개시합니다.

1000651657.english: - I took Mnemosyne's hand, who was silently gazing at me with clear eyes.
1000651657.korean: - 투명한 눈동자로 말없이 바라보는 므네모시네의 손을 잡았다.

1000651658.english: Initiating genetic analysis... Completed. Authority ID, Abel.
1000651658.korean: 유전자 분석 개시... 완료. 권한 ID, 아벨.

1000651659.english: Superuser privileges have been confirmed. Sympathy... Completed.

1000651660.english: You have obtained all rights to this entity and the right to view its ark. Welcome, Administrator.
1000651660.korean: 본 개체에 대한 모든 권리 및 해당 방주의 열람 권한을 획득하셨습니다. 환영합니다, 관리자님.

1000651661.english: - At my question, Mnemosyne slightly averted her gaze.
1000651661.korean: - 내 물음에 므네모시네는 살짝 시선을 돌렸다.

1000651662.english: ... Unable to answer. This entity does not have the authority to answer your question, administrator.
1000651662.korean: ...답변 불가. 본 개체에게는 관리자님의 의문에 대해 답변할 권한이 존재하지 않습니다.

1000651663.english: After confirming your authority, I am supposed to guide you thru the facilities of this ark.
1000651663.korean: 본디 권한 확인 후에는 본 방주의 시설을 안내해드려야 합니다.

1000651664.english: However, if a manager with special privileges requests it, you can skip this procedure.
1000651664.korean: 하지만 특급 권한을 획득하신 관리자님이 요청하실 경우, 해당 절차를 건너뛸 수 있습니다.

1000651665.english: - What would you like to do? Seeing Mnemosyne ask, I hesitated for a moment before nodding.
1000651665.korean: - 어떻게 하시겠습니까? 하고 묻는 므네모시네를 보며 잠깐 고민하다 고개를 끄덕였다.

1000651666.english: - We can use this special authority to find out how it happened.
1000651666.korean: - 어떻게 된 건지는 이 특급 권한을 이용해서 알아보면 되겠지.

1000651668.english: - Mnemosyne slowly moved toward the passage on the left side of the entrance.
1000651668.korean: - 므네모시네는 천천히 입구 왼쪽의 통로로 발걸음을 옮겼다.

1000651670.english: It really looks like a machine, not a Bioroid...

1000651672.english: Hmm, no. It must be my imagination.

1000651673.english: - Shaking her head, Ella slumped to the floor.
1000651673.korean: - 고개를 저은 엘라는 바닥에 털썩 주저앉았다.

1000651674.english: But... I, I can't do it anymore...

1000651675.english: Isn't that just your imagination too?

1000651678.english: - Seti caught Ella as she slowly collapsed and smiled awkwardly.
1000651678.korean: - 세띠는 스르르 쓰러지는 엘라를 부축하곤 난처하게 웃었다.

1000651679.english: I'm sorry, Commander. I'll go find a place to lay Ella down.
1000651679.korean: 죄송해요, 사령관님. 저는 엘라를 눕힐 곳을 좀 찾아볼게요.

1000651680.english: Then that's as far as I go too. Because I can't abandon a comrade who has sadly passed away.
1000651680.korean: 나도 그럼 여기까지네. 안타깝게 숨을 거둔 동료를 버리고 갈 순 없으니까.

1000651682.english: Even while we were chatting, Mnemosyne was quietly waiting for me by the passageway.
1000651682.korean: - 사담을 나누는 동안에도 므네모시네는 조용히 통로쪽에서 나를 기다리고 있었다.

1000651683.english: You don't need to apologize, Manager. Okay, let's resume the guidance.
1000651683.korean: 사과하실 필요 없습니다, 관리자님. 그럼, 안내를 재개하겠습니다.

1000651684.english: In this area, the 'Ark of Memory' has been built, and the genetic information of all creatures that existed until just before supplies and information updates were cut off due to the War of Annihilation is stored.
1000651684.korean: 본 구역에는 '기억의 방주'가 지어지고, 멸망 전쟁으로 인해 보급과 정보 갱신이 끊기기 직전까지 존재했던 모든 생물의 유전 정보가 저장되어 있습니다.

1000651685.english: - Then there must be genes from various bioroids as well.

1000651686.english: Mnemosyne's eyes, looking at me in surprise, seemed somehow troubled.
1000651686.korean: - 놀란 나를 바라보는 므네모시네의 눈동자는 어쩐지 착잡해 보였다.

1000651687.english: ......I will make a correction. It was saved 'was'.

1000651688.english: As Mnemosyne opened the door, there was...

1000651689.english: A cold wind blew from the genetic preservation area, which was clearly indoors.
1000651689.korean: - 실내일게 분명할 유전자 보존 구역에서부터 찬 바람이 몰아쳤다.

1000651690.english: Wind is coming in through the hole in the wall.
1000651690.korean: - 벽에 뚫린 구멍으로부터 바람이 들어오고 있다.

1000651691.english: From here, you can only see a dark passageway, but it must be connected from the outside.
1000651691.korean: - 여기서는 어두컴컴한 통로만 보일 뿐이지만 밖에서부터 연결되어 있겠지.

1000651692.english: - The warehouse where the genes of all living things were stored was...
1000651692.korean: - 거기에 모든 생물의 유전자가 보관되어 있었을 창고는...

1000651693.english: About two months ago, there was an invasion of this Ark by external forces.
1000651693.korean: 지금으로부터 약 두 달 전, 본 방주에 대한 외부 세력의 침입이 있었습니다.

1000651694.english: The one who led that force was... Lemonade Delta.
1000651694.korean: 그 세력을 이끌었던 것은... 레모네이드 델타.

1000651695.english: Lemonade Delta led her henchmen, the 'Marionettes,' in a massive attack on the main ark.
1000651695.korean: 레모네이드 델타는 자신의 수족인 '마리오네트'들을 이끌고 본 방주에 대해 대대적인 공격을 펼쳤습니다.

1000651696.english: This unit barely managed to defend the narrow front gate, but the intrusion from the outer wall…
1000651696.korean: 본 개체는 좁은 정문은 가까스로 사수했으나, 외벽으로부터의 침입은…

1000651697.english: Mnemosyne, who had trailed off for a moment, looked straight at me.
1000651697.korean: - 잠시 말을 흐린 므네모시네가 나를 똑바로 바라봤다.

1000651698.english: This entity failed to fulfill its mission of maintaining, managing, and protecting the genes stored in the ark.
1000651698.korean: 본 개체는 해당 방주에 보관된 유전자를 유지&관리하고 보호한다는 사명을 지키지 못했습니다.

1000651699.english: Accordingly, the disposal procedure by the administrator holding special privileges-
1000651699.korean: 그에 따라, 특급 권한을 보유한 관리자님에 의해 폐기 절차를-

1000651700.english: He comforted Mnemosyne, who was hanging her head, and walked into the chaotic warehouse.
1000651700.korean: - 고개를 숙이는 므네모시네를 위로해주고 난장판이 된 창고 안쪽으로 걸음을 옮겼다.

1000651701.english: After recovering the genes of the target recognition names 'Audrey Dreamweaver', 'Olivia Starsuer', and 'Taylor Clothcut', Lemonade Delta thoroughly destroyed the remaining genes.
1000651701.korean: ......레모네이드 델타는 목적이었던 인식명 '오드리 드림위버', '올리비아 스타수어', '테일러 클로스컷'의 유전자를 회수한 후, 남은 유전자들은 철저히 파괴했습니다.

1000651702.english: While the genes of a very small number of bioroids were successfully restored after recovery, most of the genes were in a state where they were completely beyond repair.
1000651702.korean: 극히 일부 바이오로이드의 유전자는 회수 후 복구하는데에 성공했으나, 대부분의 유전자는 도저히 손을 쓸 수 없는 상태였습니다.

1000651703.english: - Because their only goal is to revive the chairmen.

1000651704.english: I will send the list of genes of the restored bioroids.

1000651705.english: ...Manager. May I ask you a favor?

1000651706.english: Mnemosyne turned her gaze toward the barrier door inside the endlessly stretching warehouse.
1000651706.korean: - 므네모시네는 끝없이 펼쳐진 창고의 안쪽, 차단문으로 시선을 향했다.

1000651707.english: Lemonade Delta left some 'Marionettes' behind as they retreated after achieving their objective.
1000651707.korean: 레모네이드 델타는 목적을 달성 후 후퇴하면서 일부 '마리오네트'를 남겨두었습니다.

1000651708.english: A 'marionette' that does not receive orders is merely a puppet, but as a real entity not originally intended for combat…
1000651708.korean: 명령을 받지 않은 '마리오네트'는 그저 꼭두각시일 뿐이지만, 본디 전투용이 아닌 본개체로서는…

1000651709.english: Does that mean they've isolated them behind that barrier...

1000651710.english: In Mnemosyne, the image of Kirke, who was bound by her mission and unable to leave the theme park while isolating the Iron Bugs, overlapped.
1000651710.korean: - 므네모시네에게서 사명에 묶여 테마파크를 떠나지 못하고, 철충들을 격리해두었던 키르케의 모습이 겹쳐 보였다.

1000651712.english: I felt embarrassed by the sight of Mnemosyne blinking her eyes in bewilderment as she looked at me, so I withdrew the hand I had been stroking her head.
1000651712.korean: - 의아하다는 듯 눈을 깜빡이며 나를 바라보는 므네모시네의 모습에 민망해져서 머리를 쓰다듬던 손을 거두었다.

1000651713.english: Master, the combat unit has arrived.

1000651714.english: Whether it is good or bad luck, we have not yet engaged in combat with a bio-android unit belonging to PECS.
1000651714.korean: - 불행인지 행운인지, 아직까지 우린 PECS 소속 바이오로이드 부대와 교전을 벌인 적은 없다.

1000651715.english: There are very few individuals remaining within the genetic zone.
1000651715.korean: 유전자 구역 안에 남아있는 개체들은 극소수에요.

1000651716.english: However, some Iron Bug and a considerable number of Marionettes were found around the Ark.
1000651716.korean: 다만, 방주 주위에서 일부 철충과 상당수의 마리오네트를 발견했어요.

1000651717.english: I'll find out by questioning them.

1000651718.english: I didn't expect the moment of decision to come this quickly, but my thoughts are clear.
1000651718.korean: - 이렇게 빨리 결정의 순간이 올 줄은 몰랐지만, 내 생각은 명확하다.

1000651719.english: Even among the same bioroids, there are those who are more precious to me.
1000651719.korean: - 같은 바이오로이드일지라도, 내게는 더 소중한 이들이 있다.

1000651720.english: I will obey your words, Master.

1000651721.english: - It didn't take long to realize that taking them alive was pointless.
1000651721.korean: - 생포가 의미없다는 것을 깨닫는 데에는 얼마 걸리지 않았다.

1000651722.english: This can't even be called a Bioroid anymore.
1000651722.korean: 이건 이미 바이오로이드라고 부를 수도 없어.

1000651723.english: On the surface, it looks fine, but it won't be able to maintain its biological functions for much longer.
1000651723.korean: 겉으로는 멀쩡하지만, 얼마 지나지 않아 생물로서의 기능을 유지할 수 없을 거야.

1000651724.english: No... It might not even be a living thing anymore.

1000651725.english: - While listening to the doctor's explanation, I removed the helmet from the collapsed 'Marionette'.
1000651725.korean: - 닥터의 설명을 들으며 쓰러진 '마리오네트'에게서 헬멧을 벗겼다.

1000651726.english: - The face of an ordinary android, bleeding from the corner of its mouth, was revealed.
1000651726.korean: - 입가에서 피를 흘리는, 평범한 바이오로이드의 얼굴이 드러났다.

1000651727.english: There's a record that Delta operated some unfinished Bioroids during the Allied War.
1000651727.korean: 연합전쟁에서 델타가 미완성 바이오로이드를 일부 운용했다는 기록이 있어요.

1000651728.english: At the time, everyone believed that they were pushing a scapegoat with minimal investment in modules and Origin Dust into a losing front...
1000651728.korean: 그때는 다들 수세에 몰린 전선에 모듈과 오리진더스트를 적게 투자한 화살받이를 밀어넣었다고 판단했지만...

1000651729.english: This has far surpassed that level, in a bad way.
1000651729.korean: 이건 그런 수준을 안좋은 쪽으로 아득히 뛰어넘었어.

1000651730.english: I need to analyze it further to be sure, but the genetic level of these dolls is beyond that of ordinary Bioroids.
1000651730.korean: 좀 더 분석해봐야 확실히 알겠지만, 이 인형들의 유전학적 수준은 평범한 바이오로이드 이상이야.

1000651732.english: - Doctor sighed softly at Alpha's words.
1000651732.korean: - 알파의 말에 닥터가 작게 한숨을 내쉬었다.

1000651733.english: You're saying you did it on purpose. Or a trick?

1000651734.english: Strictly speaking, this isn't a Bioroid.

1000651735.english: - No matter how much authority and autonomy a Bioroid has, they cannot develop new Bioroids.
1000651735.korean: - 아무리 높은 권한과 자율성을 지닌 바이오로이드라도, 새로운 바이오로이드를 개발할 수는 없다.

1000651736.english: - To break free from the shackles that humans, fearing their own creations, have imposed in this way...
1000651736.korean: - 인간이 자신의 피조물을 두려워해 씌운 굴레를 이런 식으로 벗어나다니…

1000651737.english: - In my gaze, the doctor shook his head slightly.
1000651737.korean: - 내 시선에 닥터는 작게 고개를 저었다.

1000651738.english: I understand how you feel, but... It's impossible. It would be easier if you just killed me.
1000651738.korean: 오빠 맘은 알지만... 불가능해. 차라리 죽여주는 게 더 편할거야.

1000651739.english: "Doctor," he said, using a cliché, and then added with a bitter smile, "but..."
1000651739.korean: - 닥터는 진부한 말이지만, 하고 씁쓸하게 덧붙였다.

1000651740.english: - I almost wished they had attacked us, armed with their loyalty to PECS.
1000651740.korean: - 차라리 저들이 PECS에 대한 충성심으로 무장하고 우리를 공격했으면, 하는 생각이 들었다.

1000651741.english: - It's cowardly, but... At least the guilt will be less.

1000651743.english: - To fully secure the system, the combat units dispersed to their assigned sectors.
1000651743.korean: - 제도를 완전히 확보하기 위해 전투부대가 각자 맡은 구역으로 흩어졌다.

1000651744.english: - While observing the situation of the members, who were busy Setting up temporary bases near the harbor and inside the ark with mixed feelings,
1000651744.korean: - 착잡한 기분으로 항구 근처와 방주 내부에 임시 주둔지를 세우기 위해 분주한 대원들의 상황을 살피는 도중,

1000651745.english: - Someone approached me... no, they ran toward me.
1000651745.korean: - 누군가 내 곁으로 다가… 아니, 달려왔다.

1000651747.english: Oh dear, I must have been running too fast! Are you okay?
1000651747.korean: 어이쿠, 제가 너무 급하게 달려왔나보군요! 괜찮으십니까?

1000651749.english: ? I'm going to live a long life, but I'm going to die soon! What are you doing, okay?

1000651750.english: . Oh dear, the connection is a bit unstable.

1000651752.english: - Alfred seemed busy for a while, twisting his body strangely and tapping it.
1000651752.korean: - 알프레드는 한동안 몸을 기묘하게 꺾고, 통통 두드리는 등 분주해보였다.

1000651753.english: Okay, that's done. Maintenance is complete!

1000651754.english: I've been thinking that Robert's body has been a bit too rough for Mr. Alfred lately anyway!
1000651754.korean: 안그래도 요새 로버트의 소체는 이 Mr.알프레드에게는 너무 우악스럽다는 생각을 하고 있었으니까요!

1000651755.english: If you have some free time, try making another body- HEEEYAAAAAAAH!
1000651755.korean: 여유가 난다면 다른 소체도 만들어 보- 흐이야아아아악!

1000651756.english: - Alfred, who had been chatting excitedly, jumped in shock upon seeing the devastation of the gene preservation zone.
1000651756.korean: - 신나게 떠들던 알프레드는 유전자 보존 구역의 참상을 보고 펄쩍 뛰었다.

1000651757.english: What in the world is going on here!

1000651758.english: I've been counting down the days, waiting for this very day to come to the gene preservation zone of the famous 'Ark of Memory'!
1000651758.korean: 그 유명한 '기억의 방주'의 유전자 보존 구역에 오는 바로 이날만을 손꼽아 기다려왔는데!

1000651759.english: Kwooo, I absolutely cannot forgive this...! Who on earth did this?!
1000651759.korean: 쿠오오, 도저히 용서할 수 없습니다...! 대체 누구입니까, 이런 짓을 한 건...!

1000651761.english: Of course. And... That lady, even for me, it's a little...
1000651761.korean: 알다마다요. 그리고... 그 아주머니는 아무리 저라도 조금...

1000651762.english: - Head with a mechanical arm... Can you say that?
1000651762.korean: - 기계팔로 머리... 라고 할 수 있나?

1000651763.english: - Anyway, Alfred, scratching the round part, continued speaking.
1000651763.korean: - 어쨌든 둥근 부분을 긁적이던 알프레드가 말을 이었다.

1000651764.english: A little... Because it's creepy. I've only seen it in the records, tho.
1000651764.korean: 조금... 소름끼쳐서요. 기록으로 본 것 뿐입니다만.

1000651765.english: I took a quick look around the information area.

1000651766.english: Kuhuhu, of course, my "a little" is "a little" different from the usual "a little"!
1000651766.korean: 쿠후후, 물론 저의 '조금'은 일반적인 조금과는 '조금' 다르지만요!

1000651767.english: That's a good idea! You'll definitely like it. And-
1000651767.korean: 좋은 생각이십니다! 분명 마음에 드실테죠. 그리고-

1000651768.english: No way! How could you just leave me here!

1000651769.english: Commander, you have a bit of a mischievous side, don't you?
1000651769.korean: 사령관님께선 은근히 짓궂은 면이 있으시단 말입니다.

1000651770.english: And that's not even mentioning what you said to me last time about being a useless tin can.
1000651770.korean: 저번에 저한테 쓸모없는 깡통이라는 말을 하신것도 그렇고요.

1000651771.english: Back then, it was a tin can, but it wasn't useless!
1000651771.korean: 그때는 깡통은 맞았지만, 쓸모없지는 않았단 말입니다!

1000651772.english: - After a while of exchanging frivolous banter, Alfred suddenly became serious.
1000651772.korean: - 한동안 실없는 이야기를 나누다, 알프레드는 돌연 진지한 어투가 되었다.

1000651773.english: You don't need to worry so much, Commander.

1000651774.english: There are just as many absurd things in the world as there are good things.
1000651774.korean: 세상에는 좋은 일 만큼이나 부조리한 일도 많지요.

1000651775.english: "It's presumptuous of a tin robot to say this, but..." Alfred added, and then continued speaking.
1000651775.korean: - 깡통 로봇 주제에 주제넘는 말입니다만, 하고 덧붙인 알프레드가 말을 이었다.

1000651776.english: However, just because something absurd happens, you shouldn't give up or stop.
1000651776.korean: 하지만 부조리한 일이 생긴다고 해서, 포기하거나 멈춰 서서는 안됩니다.

1000651777.english: With all your might! You have to struggle and overcome it triumphantly!
1000651777.korean: 있는 힘껏! 발버둥쳐서 여봐란듯이 이겨내는 겁니다!

1000651779.english: This is the perfect job for me! As you command.
1000651779.korean: 저한테 딱 맞는 일이로군요! 분부대로 합죠.

1000651780.english: Thanks to Alfred, my complicated thoughts seemed to be clearing up a little.
1000651780.korean: - 알프레드 덕분에 복잡하던 머릿속이 조금은 정리되는 것 같았다.

1000651781.english: - She let out a small sigh to shake off the remaining heavy emotions and headed toward Mnemosyne, who was standing like a statue in the corridor.
1000651781.korean: - 작게 한숨을 내쉬어 남아있는 무거운 감정을 털어내고, 통로 쪽에서 조각상처럼 서있는 므네모시네에게로 향했다.

1000651783.english: As the 'Mnemosyne' who managed this ark, I am deeply grateful, Administrator.
1000651783.korean: 본 방주를 관리하던 '므네모시네'로서, 깊이 감사드립니다, 관리자님.

1000651784.english: - When asked if they could stay on the ark and nearby islands for a while, Mnemosyne tilted her head in puzzlement.
1000651784.korean: - 방주와 근처 제도에 당분간 머물러도 되겠냐는 물음에 므네모시네는 의아하다는듯 고개를 기울였다.

1000651785.english: All rights related to this ark belong to the administrator.
1000651785.korean: 해당 방주에 관련된 모든 권한은 관리자님의 것입니다.

1000651786.english: You are free to use this object in any way you like, including deciding its fate.
1000651786.korean: 본 개체의 생사여탈을 포함, 어떻게 사용하셔도 문제는 없습니다.

1000651787.english: - At the somewhat mischievous question, Mnemosyne's eyelashes fluttered slightly.
1000651787.korean: - 다소 짓궂은 물음에 므네모시네의 속눈썹이 살짝 떨렸다.

1000651790.english: - A faint smile played on Mnemosyne's lips as she blinked at me.
1000651790.korean: - 나를 보며 눈을 깜박이던 므네모시네의 입가에 희미한 미소가 걸렸다.

1000651791.english: ... Request approved. I look forward to working with you, Administrator.

1000651793.english: - Returning to the lobby, I then went thru the opposite corridor and arrived at the information area.
1000651793.korean: - 다시 로비로 돌아와서 이번엔 반대편 통로를 지나 정보 구역에 도착했다.

1000651794.english: - I could see the team members scattered throughout, carrying out backup operations.
1000651794.korean: - 곳곳에 대원들이 흩어져 백업 작업을 진행하는 것이 보였다.

1000651796.english: Unable to answer. I didn't understand what the administrator meant by 'ordinary'.
1000651796.korean: 답변 불가. 관리자님이 말씀하시는 '평범'이란 것의 의미를 파악하지 못했습니다.

1000651797.english: If this information section is "ordinary, without being outstanding or unusual," does that mean there are also outstanding information sections?
1000651797.korean: 이 정보 구역이 '뛰어나거나 색다른 점이 없이 보통' 이라면, 특출난 정보 구역도 있다는 뜻입니까?

1000651799.english: This entity also has that permission.

1000651802.english: - Orangeade, who was in the middle of working, approached us.
1000651802.korean: - 한창 작업을 하고 있던 오렌지에이드가 우리에게 다가왔다.

1000651804.english: - The report on the orangeade, which began with a look of embarrassment...

1000651805.english: - Stories from before I was even born, stories from before the destruction, even stories about when they infiltrated North America.
1000651805.korean: - 내가 아직 없었을때의 이야기, 멸망 전의 이야기, 북미에 침투했을 때 있었던 이야기까지.

1000651806.english: - After a long detour, it ended in exactly 17 minutes and 23 seconds.
1000651806.korean: - 먼 길을 돌고 돌아 정확히 17분 23초만에 끝났다.

1000651807.english: Yes, that's exactly it. And when I looked into the method, it's definitely the work of Omega.
1000651807.korean: 네네, 바로 그거예요. 그리고 그 방식을 살펴보니까 오메가의 소행이 분명해요.

1000651809.english: Yes. Well, he's a villain, but even villains have their own perspectives, so it's inevitable that they'll eliminate anything that gets in the way of their work.
1000651809.korean: 네. 뭐, 악당이긴 하지만 악당도 악당 나름대로의 입장이 있으니까 본인 일에 방해가 되는 걸 제거하는 건 어쩔 수 없죠.

1000651810.english: But look at this. They just erased things completely unrelated to that, like scribbling in a book.
1000651810.korean: 그런데 이것 좀 보세요. 그거랑 전혀 상관없는 것들도 그냥 막 책에 낙서하듯이 마구잡이로 지워놨어요.

1000651811.english: That woman's skills are just ridiculously good, and no matter what I try, this is impossible to restore.
1000651811.korean: 그 아줌마 진짜 솜씨는 또 얼마나 쓸데없이 좋은지 이건 무슨 수를 써도 복원이 불가능해요.

1000651812.english: Hehe, it's a bit cold, isn't it?

1000651813.english: - The code was unreadable, but thanks to the detailed notes left by Orangeade, it was clear that a significant amount of information had been lost.
1000651813.korean: - 코드는 알아볼 수 없었지만, 오렌지에이드가 꼼꼼하게 달아놓은 메모 덕에 정보가 상당량 유실됐다는 건 알 수 있었다.

1000651816.english: - After putting a finger to her lips and blowing a kiss, as if she had learned it somewhere, the orangeade went back to work.
1000651816.korean: - 어디서 배웠는지 입술에 손가락을 갖다대곤 키스를 날린 오렌지에이드가 다시 작업으로 돌아갔다.

1000651817.english: - I feel like my lifespan has been shortened by about 17 minutes and 23 seconds...

1000651818.english: There is now only one zone left, Manager. However...
1000651818.korean: 이제 구역 한 개가 남았습니다, 관리자님. 다만...

1000651819.english: During the previous Lemonade Delta attack, the ecological conservation area located somewhat on the outskirts was also damaged.
1000651819.korean: 이전 레모네이드 델타의 공격 때, 다소 외곽에 있는 생태 보존 구역 또한 피해를 입었습니다.

1000651820.english: According to the Ark's operational policy, if forced intervention from the outside is confirmed, the preservation zone will be sealed off and restoration work will begin.
1000651820.korean: 방주의 운영 방침상, 보존 구역은 외부로부터의 강제적인 개입이 확인될 경우, 구역을 봉쇄하고 복구 작업에 들어가게 됩니다

1000651821.english: It is expected that approximately two more weeks will be needed.
1000651821.korean: 대략 2주 정도의 시간이 더 필요할 것으로 예상됩니다.

1000651822.english: There are no plants or a few species of small animals.
1000651822.korean: 식물들과 소동물 몇 종 말고는 존재하지 않습니다.

1000651823.english: Anyway, an ecological conservation area... I checked the relevant information in the backed-up data.
1000651823.korean: - 그나저나 생태 보존 구역이라... 백업한 데이터에서 관련 정보를 확인했다.

1000651824.english: Excluding the basic elements, the gene and information zones, one special zone is installed in each ark.
1000651824.korean: 기본 요소인 유전자, 정보 구역을 제외하고, 각 방주별로 특별한 구역이 한 개씩 설치되어 있습니다.

1000651825.english: This ark contains an area that recreates and preserves a small-scale ecosystem.
1000651825.korean: 본 방주에는 소규모의 생태계를 재현, 보존한 구역이 존재합니다.

1000651828.english: Just as Mnemosyne, who had been hesitating, was about to open her mouth, Alpha approached us.
1000651828.korean: - 망설이던 므네모시네가 입을 열려는 찰나, 알파가 우리에게 다가왔다.

1000651830.english: We just received a report that an unidentified AGS was encountered while securing the area.
1000651830.korean: 방금 지역 확보 도중 정체 불명의 AGS와 마주했다는 보고가 들어왔어요.

1000651831.english: Fortunately, they say it isn't hostile.

1000651832.english: Rather, it is said that they are helping their own forces in battle.
1000651832.korean: 오히려 아군의 전투를 돕고 있다고 합니다.

1000651833.english: I received the panel from Alpha and checked the real-time video.
1000651833.korean: - 알파로부터 패널을 건네받아 실시간 영상을 확인했다.

1000651835.english: - The large bird-shaped AGS flew around, fighting the Iron Worms.
1000651835.korean: - 커다란 새 형태의 AGS는 이리저리 날아다니며 철충을 상대했다.

1000651836.english: - Only after the battle was over and I confirmed that the AGS was returning with the crew did I remember that Mnemosyne was waiting.
1000651836.korean: - 전투가 마무리되고, AGS가 대원들과 함께 복귀하는 것을 확인하고 나서야 므네모시네가 기다리고 있다는 것을 떠올렸다.

1000651837.english: This entity will return to the accommodation and wait.

1000651838.english: Please call me if you need anything.

1000651842.english: The unidentified AGS... has changed its appearance.

1000651844.english: This is disappointing. A bird, to me, the king of the harpies?
1000651844.korean: 이거 실망인걸. 하피의 왕인 이몸에게 새라니.

1000651845.english: - After finishing the battle, the mysterious AGS obediently followed the members to the lobby.
1000651845.korean: - 정체불명의 AGS는 전투를 마무리한 뒤 순순히 대원들을 따라 로비까지 왔다.

1000651846.english: I am Peregrinus. He is the great king of the harpies.

1000651847.english: Well, yeah. Because there's no such thing as a harpy in this world.
1000651847.korean: 뭐, 그렇지. 이 세상에 하피 같은 건 없으니까.

1000651848.english: Cheerfully brushing it off with a laugh, Peregrinus plopped down in front of me.
1000651848.korean: - 쾌활하게 웃어넘긴 페레그리누스는 내 앞에 털썩 앉았다.

1000651849.english: Do you know a work called Dragon Slayer? A collaboration between Bismark and Densetsu.
1000651849.korean: 혹시 '드래곤 슬레이어'라는 작품 알아? 비스마르크랑 덴세츠의 합작.

1000651850.english: The title of the comic book LRL used to carry around came to mind.
1000651850.korean: - LRL이 갖고 다니던 만화책의 제목이 떠올랐다.

1000651851.english: So you do know it? I was a supporting character in that.

1000651852.english: That's kind of an odd self-introduction...

1000651853.english: That's what I want to ask. How is a human still alive?
1000651853.korean: 그건 내가 묻고 싶은데. 어떻게 인간이 아직 살아있는거지?

1000651854.english: Haha, if it's hard to talk about, that's fine. You're wondering how I ended up here, right?
1000651854.korean: 하핫, 말하기 곤란하면 됐어. 내가 여기 어떻게 왔냐고 물었지?

1000651855.english: Peregrinus let out what seemed like a deep sigh, then continued speaking.
1000651855.korean: - 페레그리누스는 깊게 한숨을 내쉬는 듯한 행동을 하곤 말을 이었다.

1000651856.english: After humanity was wiped out, I just wanted to wander around and live freely, but Glacias-neunim caught me.
1000651856.korean: 인간들이 전멸하고 나서 그냥 적당히 돌아다니면서 살고 싶었는데, 글라시아스 누님한테 붙잡혔거든.

1000651857.english: That nunim is kind but has this oddly strict side, so she's been dragging me around saying I have to fulfill a contract.
1000651857.korean: 그 누님은 인자하면서도 은근 고지식한 면이 있어서, 계약을 이행해야 한다고 나까지 끌고 다니고 있어.

1000651858.english: To protect humans and what they left behind, from non-human beings.
1000651858.korean: 인외의 존재로부터 인간과 인간이 남긴 것을 수호한다.

1000651859.english: When I heard Lemonade Delta had attacked this place, I came as fast as I could, but I was still too late.
1000651859.korean: 레모네이드 델타가 이곳을 공격했다는 소식을 듣고 최대한 빨리 왔는데도 늦었네.

1000651860.english: Peregrinus shrugged as he said, "We're a bit late on intel."
1000651860.korean: - 우리는 정보가 좀 늦거든, 하고 어깨를 으쓱하는 페레그리누스의 말에 의문이 들었다.

1000651862.english: Before the Metal Parasites showed up, you could say we were on the same side, more or less...
1000651862.korean: 철충들이 나타나기 전까지는 뭐, 굳이 말하자면 같은 편이라고 할 수있었지만...

1000651863.english: But since the Lemonades started acting independently—well, you can see for yourself.
1000651863.korean: 레모네이드들이 독자적으로 행동하고 나서부터는 뭐, 지금 보다시피.

1000651864.english: "To protect humans and what they left behind, from non-human beings."
1000651864.korean: "인외"의 존재로부터 인간과 인간이 남긴 것을 수호한다.

1000651865.english: The contract with nunim... technically, it was an order from Chairman Bismark, but whatever.
1000651865.korean: 누님에게 얽힌 계약... 사실은 비스마르크 회장의 명령이지만 뭐 어쨌든.

1000651866.english: That guy was probably talking about the Metal Parasites when he said that, but he got caught up in his own world-building and gave the order in this grandiose way, and that came back to bite us.
1000651866.korean: 그 양반은 철충을 의도하고 말한 거겠지만, 지가 만든 설정에 취해서 굳이 멋들어지게 명령하려던 게 화를 불렀지.

1000651867.english: As long as that command remains, from the moment the Lemonades started acting on their own, we were destined to become enemies.
1000651867.korean: 그게 남아있는 이상, 레모네이드들이 독자적으로 행동했을 때부터 우리랑은 적이 될 수밖에 없는 운명이었어.

1000651868.english: Yeah, that's right. We were made as clowns, tools, and we're bound by orders—but that doesn't mean we're thoughtless.
1000651868.korean: 뭐, 그렇지. 우린 그저 광대, 도구로 만들어진데다가 명령에 얽매여 있지만 그렇다고 아무 생각도 없는 건 아니니까.

1000651869.english: There are lines in this world that shouldn't be crossed.
1000651869.korean: 세상에는 지켜야할 선이라는 게 있는 법이야.

1000651870.english: You saw it too, didn't you? The marionette.

1000651871.english: And that's Delta's method. But honestly, there are things happening in this world without humans that are just as bad, if not worse.
1000651871.korean: 게다가 그건 델타의 방식이고, 그것보다 더하면 더했지 덜하진 않은 일들이 인간들이 사라진 이 세상에서 벌어지고 있어.

1000651872.english: I don't know how this'll sound, but… getting killed by the Metal Parasites might actually be cleaner.
1000651872.korean: 이런말을 하면 어떨지 모르겠지만, 철충한테 당하는 게 차라리 더 깔끔할걸.

1000651873.english: So… let me ask you, human.

1000651875.english: In an instant, the light mood around Peregrinus shifted dramatically.

1000651876.english: As he rose and looked down coldly, the surrounding team members pointed their weapons at him.
1000651876.korean: - 몸을 일으키며 싸늘하게 내려다보는 페레그리누스를 향해 주위에 있던 대원들의 무기가 겨누어졌다.

1000651878.english: After studying the team members for a while, Peregrinus shrugged and sat back down with a thud.
1000651878.korean: - 한동안 대원들을 살펴보던 페레그리누스가 어깨를 으쓱하곤 다시 털썩 주저앉았다.

1000651879.english: At the same time, the heavy tension in the air lifted.

1000651881.english: Yeah. You're someone important to these people.

1000651882.english: Hahaha, well, I guess that's part of it.

1000651883.english: Peregrinus laughed cheerfully and held out his hand.

1000651884.english: Then let's get along. There's no justice left in this world, and I'm not even human, but...
1000651884.korean: 그럼 잘 부탁해. 정의는 커녕 아무것도 안 남은 세상이고, 나는 사람도 아니지만...

1000651886.english: I took the hand Peregrinus held out.
