1000651887.english: Beyond the cold, metallic hand, I could feel an unwavering conviction and will.
1000651887.korean: - 차가운 금속으로 만들어진 손 너머로, 절대 흔들리지 않는 신념과 의지가 느껴졌다.

1000651888.english: By the way, have you met Glacias-neunim?

1000651889.english: < Message from the Arctic Expedition Team. Encountered a friendly AGS called "Glacias." >
1000651889.korean: < 북극 탐험대로부터의 전언. '글라시아스'라는 우호적인 AGS와 조우.>

1000651890.english: < Accepted as an expedition companion. Continuing mission. Will stop by to say hello upon return. >
1000651890.korean: < 탐험 동료로 맞아들이고 임무를 지속중. 복귀 시 인사하러 가겠음.>

1000651891.english: <P.S. At the time of encounter, LRL member's heart almost stopped.>
1000651891.korean: <P.S. 조우 당시 LRL 대원의 심장이 멎을뻔함.>

1000651892.english: There are quite a few things to nitpick here and there...

1000651893.english: But judging by the lack of reports from the outer units, it doesn't seem to be a dangerous situation.
1000651893.korean: - 외부를 맡은 부대에게서 별다른 보고가 없는 걸 보면 위험한 상황은 아니겠지.

1000651894.english: Yeah? Then you should definitely meet her when she gets back. She's a good nunim—except for being a bit stiff.
1000651894.korean: 그래? 돌아오면 너도 꼭 만나봐. 좀 고지식한 거 빼곤 좋은 누님이니까.

1000651895.english: Just as I was about to search the backup data for information on Glacias, a scream rang out from the other side of the lobby.
1000651895.korean: - 백업한 데이터에서 글라시아스의 정보를 찾아보려는 순간, 로비 저편에서 누군가의 비명 소리가 들렸다.

1000651897.english: Who do we have here?! Is it not the great King of Harpies, Lord Peregrinus himself?!
1000651897.korean: 이게 누구십니까! 위대한 하피의 왕, 페레그리누스 님이 아니십니까!

1000651899.english: Of course! Ugh, their performance in the final part of the story was truly...!
1000651899.korean: 알다마다요! 크윽, 이야기 종반부에서의 그 활약은 실로...!

1000651900.english: Whoa, be careful. This friend here hasn't seen it yet, so don't spoil it.
1000651900.korean: 워워, 조심해. 여기 이 친구는 아직 안봤다니까 스포일러 하지 말라고.

1000651901.english: What did you say?! Commander, is that true?

1000651902.english: What a lamentable thing! How can you be human and not watch Dragon Slayer?!
1000651902.korean: 이런 통탄스러운 일이! 어찌 인간이 되어서 드래곤 슬레이어를 안 볼 수가 있단 말씀이십니까!

1000651903.english: Hurry up and apologize to me and Miss LRL!

1000651904.english: Oh, I still don't feel your sincerity! More, more!
1000651904.korean: 어허, 아직 진심이 느껴지지 않습니다! 더요, 더!

1000651905.english: - But how does Alfred know? Since there were materials left in Guam, did you live looking at those, like LRL?
1000651905.korean: - 그런데 알프레드는 어떻게 아는거지? 괌에 자료가 남아있어서 LRL처럼 그걸 보면서 지냈나?

1000651906.english: Oh, I just saw it in the information area a little while ago.
1000651906.korean: 아, 조금 전에 정보 구역에서 보고 왔습죠.

1000651907.english: - A feeling I had never experienced before surged from deep within my chest.
1000651907.korean: - 가슴 속 깊은 곳에서 한 번도 느껴보지 못했던 감정이 치솟았다.

1000651908.english: - This is... Okay. Let's call it "killing intent."

1000651909.english: - While I was debating whether to draw my gun from my holster, taking a cue from Vanilla, Alfred and Peregrinus continued their friendly conversation as if they were a famous actor and his fan.
1000651909.korean: - 내가 바닐라를 본받아 홀스터에서 총을 뽑을까 말까 고민하는 동안 알프레드와 페레그리누스는 마치 유명 배우와 그 팬처럼 화기애애하게 대화를 이어갔다.

1000651910.english: Wow, this is an honor. I don't even know how long it's been since I've met my fans.
1000651910.korean: 이야, 이거 영광인걸. 대체 얼마만에 팬을 만나보는지 모르겠어.

1000651911.english: The honor is all mine! But, by any chance... Are there other people here as well...?
1000651911.korean: 저야말로 영광입니다! 그런데 혹시... 다른 분들도 여기 계신지...?

1000651912.english: Oh, Sister Glacias is outside right now.
1000651912.korean: 아, 글라시아스 누님은 지금 밖에 있어.

1000651914.english: And the True Ancestor kid... It's a bit ambiguous, but since that friend is there, I might be able to meet them.
1000651914.korean: 그리고 진조 꼬맹이는... 좀 애매하지만 저 친구가 있으니 만나볼 수도 있을거야.

1000651915.english: That's all there is for now.

1000651917.english: ... That's right. The reason I endured that hardship and lived thru all the humiliation and oppression under the Commander and Miss Vanilla...
1000651917.korean: ...그렇습니다. 제가 그 고초를 겪고, 사령관님과 바닐라 양 밑에서 온갖 모멸과 핍박을 견뎌내며 살아온 것은…

1000651918.english: This was for this very moment...!

1000651919.english: What's up, buddy? Were they the type to heap all sorts of humiliation and oppression on you?
1000651919.korean: 뭐야, 친구. 온갖 모멸과 핍박을 주는 타입이었어?

1000651920.english: Of course! Last time, you even said I was a useless tin can... that was so harsh!
1000651920.korean: 그렇다마다요! 저번에는 저한테 쓸모없는 깡통이라는 심한 말도...!

1000651921.english: Ugh, it's making me cry. I don't have tear ducts, tho!
1000651921.korean: 크윽, 눈물이 나는군요. 제게 눈물샘은 없지만요!

1000651923.english: Hahaha! Oh, okay. Since we're on the subject, why don't you sit down for a moment?
1000651923.korean: 하하핫. 아, 그래. 이야기 나온김에 잠깐 앉아봐.

1000651924.english: What? I don't know, but they do?

1000651926.english: Ugh, I can't possibly keep up with the young lady's fanatical devotion...!
1000651926.korean: 크윽, 아가씨의 팬심은 저로서는 도저히 따라갈 수 없습니다...!

1000651927.english: - An AGS that shifts between human and bird forms, and a boisterous tin can robot.
1000651927.korean: - 인간과 새 형태를 오가는 AGS와 호들갑스러운 깡통 로봇.

1000651928.english: - And one human who doesn't even know how they were born.
1000651928.korean: - 그리고 자기가 어떻게 태어났는지도 모르는 인간이 하나.

1000651929.english: - Anyone who saw this bizarre combination would probably question what it was all about...
1000651929.korean: - 누가 보면 이 괴상한 조합은 대체 뭐냐고 딴지를 걸만한 조합이었지만…

1000651930.english: - The more we talked and exchanged good-natured jokes, the more comfortable I felt.
1000651930.korean: - 악의없는 농담을 던지며 이야기를 나눌수록 점점 더 편안한 기분이 들었다.

1000651937.english: Then, shall we go look at the accommodation together in a little while? They say the campsite near the harbor is almost finished.
1000651937.korean: 그럼 좀 이따 같이 숙소 보러 갈래? 항구쪽에 숙영지 어느정도 완성됐대.

1000651939.english: Okay. Then I'll just give the search report to the commander and come back.
1000651939.korean: 알았어. 그럼 나 수색 보고서만 사령관한테 주고 올테니까-

1000651941.english: What, are you trying to keep me in check? I didn't see it that way~

1000651945.english: ... Well, there are definitely parts we can't fill.
1000651945.korean: ...뭐, 우리가 채워줄 수 없는 부분이 분명히 있으니까.

1000651949.english: Let's leave the commander and just have fun together, girls! Let's buy lots of snacks too!
1000651949.korean: 사령관은 놔두고 여자끼리 놀자~ 간식도 잔뜩 사서~

1000651951.english: - The next day was spent busily cleaning the inside and outside of the ark, building a campsite, and carefully scouting across the sea to the mainland.
1000651951.korean: - 다음날까지 방주 내부와 외부를 정리하고, 숙영지를 건설하고, 바다 건너 육지까지 조심스럽게 정찰하는 등 바쁘게 보냈다.

1000651954.english: ... Yes. The Arctic expedition team and the AGS Glacius encountered a walrus off the coast of the island.
1000651954.korean: ...네. 북극 탐험대와 AGS 글라시아스가 섬 외곽에서 장화와 조우했어요.

1000651955.english: Nothing much happened, but now it's about time...

1000651956.english: - A few months ago, when we were gathering the scattered operatives from around the world to escape the rampaging Iron Blooded, we received a report from the operatives in Japan.
1000651956.korean: - 몇 달 전, 폭주하는 철충을 피해 세계 각지에 퍼져있는 대원들을 소집할 때, 일본 쪽 대원들에게서 한 가지 보고를 받았다.

1000651957.english: Since arriving here, we've been going our separate ways.
1000651957.korean: 이곳에 도착하고 나서부턴 따로 행동하고 있어요.

1000651958.english: We believe they are hiding in a small village west of where we are anchored.
1000651958.korean: 저희가 정박한 곳 서쪽의 작은 마을에 몸을 숨기고 있는걸로 파악돼요.

1000651959.english: - Specifically, JangHwa and CheonA, who were in the same unit, helped with the withdrawal operation.
1000651959.korean: - 바로 장화, 그리고 같은 부대 소속인 천아가 철수 작전에 도움을 주었다는 것.

1000651960.english: - The members stationed in Japan were mostly new recruits, and the infrastructure was not yet fully established.
1000651960.korean: - 일본 쪽에 자리잡은 대원들은 배치된 지 얼마 안 된 인원이 대부분이었고, 아직 인프라도 완벽히 갖춰지지 않았었다.

1000651961.english: - If the two of them hadn't been there, they wouldn't have been able to withdraw safely, and since JangHwa had a temporary identification card, no one opposed their accompanying them.
1000651961.korean: - 만약 둘이 없었다면 무사히 철수를 마칠 수 없었을 뿐더러, 장화에게는 임시 인식증이 있었기에 아무도 둘의 동행을 반대하지 않았다.

1000651962.english: - Whether we joined up at St. Lawrence Island along the way, or when we sailed the Arctic Ocean as a fleet...
1000651962.korean: - 도중에 세인트 로렌스 섬에서 합류했을때도, 선단을 이뤄 북극해를 항해할 때도...

1000651963.english: - JangHwa and CheonA remained in a secluded corner of the transport ship and took no other action.
1000651963.korean: - 장화와 천아는 수송선 구석진 곳에 머물러 있을 뿐, 별다른 행동을 취하지 않았다.

1000651964.english: - Oh, Silky did make a sad face because some of the hand warmers were missing.
1000651964.korean: - 아, 핫팩이 몇 개씩 비어서 실키가 울상을 짓긴 했지만.

1000651968.english: - I came out of the ark at the request of the self-proclaimed Arctic Exploration Team. There...
1000651968.korean: - 자칭 북극 탐험대의 요청에 따라 방주 밖으로 나왔다. 거기엔...

1000651971.english: - I spoke to JangHwa again, meeting her eyes as she avoided my gaze while answering.
1000651971.korean: - 시선을 피하며 대답하는 장화와 눈을 맞추며 재차 말을 걸었다.

1000651972.english: ...... I was originally going to do it secretly.

1000651973.english: - JangHwa continued speaking, still avoiding eye contact.
1000651973.korean: - 장화는 여전히 시선을 피하며 말을 이었다.

1000651974.english: Because it was a situation where I couldn't possibly stop it without being caught.
1000651974.korean: 도저히 안 들키게 막을 수 없는 상황이었으니까.

1000651975.english: - When I stopped talking, JangHwa cautiously turned her head.
1000651975.korean: - 내가 말을 멈추자 장화가 조심스레 고개를 돌렸다.

1000651976.english: - The trembling purple pupils looked at me anxiously.
1000651976.korean: - 흔들리는 자주색 동공이 나를 불안하게 바라봤다.

1000651977.english: ......... That's why I was trying to do it secretly.

1000651978.english: - He gently ruffled JangHwa's hair, who was grumbling, and held out the recognition certificate he had received.
1000651978.korean: - 볼멘소리를 하는 장화의 머리카락을 부드럽게 흐트려주고 받아온 인식증을 내밀었다.

1000651981.english: - JangHwa, having received the recognition certificate, stared blankly at it for a while.
1000651981.korean: - 인식증을 받아든 장화는 한동안 멍하니 그것을 내려다보고 있었다.

1000651983.english: - JangHwa, who had been looking at me with a complex expression, soon turned away.
1000651983.korean: - 나를 보고 복잡한 표정을 짓던 장화는 이내 몸을 돌렸다.

1000651984.english: - Finally, after looking back one last time, the boots soon disappeared again beyond the snowfield.
1000651984.korean: - 마지막으로 한 번 더 뒤돌아본 장화는 곧 다시 설원 너머로 사라졌다.

1000651985.english: - Lost in sentimental thoughts, I gazed at the back of the boots, and as I turned, a giant dragon appeared before me.
1000651985.korean: - 센티멘탈한 기분으로 장화의 뒷모습을 바라보다 몸을 돌리자 눈 앞에는 거대한 용.

1000651986.english: - I was literally shocked and fell over.

1000651987.english: Behold, mortals! The form of the dragon controlled by the Jinjo!
1000651987.korean: 목도하라, 필멸자여! 진조가 부리는 드래곤의 모습을!

1000651988.english: See! Didn't I say you'd be really surprised?

1000651989.english: What's up, Captain? Even after being informed in advance, you're still this surprised.
1000651989.korean: 뭐야, 캡틴. 미리 보고했는데도 이렇게 놀라다니.

1000651990.english: I, the leader of the Triaina Exploration Team, am extremely disappointed!

1000651991.english: - I remembered something I forgot to do last time when I was trying to check information about Glacia. Then...
1000651991.korean: - 저번에 글라시아스의 정보를 확인하려다 깜빡했던 일이 떠올랐다. 그렇다면...

1000651992.english: It's good to see you. I am Glacias. They say he's a companion of the Dragon Slayer and a protector of humanity.
1000651992.korean: 반갑구나. 나는 글라시아스. 용살자의 동료이자, 인류의 수호자란다.

1000651993.english: Heh heh, it's just as I heard from the little Jinjo girl and the expedition leader.
1000651993.korean: 후후, 꼬마 진조 아가씨와 탐험대장에게 들었던 그대로구나.

1000651997.english: Have you already said hello? Still, I'll introduce myself again properly.
1000651997.korean: 인사는 벌써 했나? 그래도 다시 정식으로 소개할게.

1000651998.english: Commander, as I mentioned before, this is Sister Glacias. Oh, very elegant, beautiful, and high- hmm hmm.
1000651998.korean: 사령관, 저번에 말했지만 이쪽은 글라시아스 누님. 아~주 기품있고 아름답고 고지- 흠흠.

1000651999.english: And sister, this is the last human and the commander leading the Bioroid Resistance.
1000651999.korean: 그리고 누님, 여기는 최후의 인간이자 바이오로이드 저항군을 이끄는 사령관.

1000652000.english: He's a great friend, so be careful not to fall for him.

1000652001.english: Thank you for the introduction, Peregrinus.

1000652002.english: Oh, and 'confirmed' is done by me, so you don't have to- Oh, wait.
1000652002.korean: 아, 그리고 '확인'은 내가 했으니까 안 해도- 아차.

1000652004.english: Still, you never know. The world is a dangerous place, and you shouldn't judge people based on their appearance alone.
1000652004.korean: 그래도 혹시 모르잖아. 세상이 얼마나 험한데, 겉모습만 보고 판단하면 안된다고.

1000652006.english: Oh, really. Okay, I understand. Still, I'm not going to apologize separately. I've already solved them all.
1000652006.korean: 아아, 거참. 알겠수다. 그래도 따로 사과는 안 할 거야. 이미 다 풀었거든.

1000652008.english: I'm sorry. Still, he's a good kid, so don't take it too much to heart.
1000652008.korean: 미안하구나. 그래도 좋은 아이니, 너무 마음에 두지 말거라.

1000652009.english: - He glanced at the self-proclaimed Arctic expedition team in the back, who were distributing what seemed to be the spoils of their exploration.
1000652009.korean: - 뒷쪽에서 탐험의 전리품인듯한 잡동사니들을 분배하는 자칭 북극 탐험대에게 시선을 주었다.

1000652010.english: Hmph, no. Rather, thanks to you, it was a pleasant time.
1000652010.korean: 후후, 아니다. 오히려 덕분에 즐거운 시간이었으니.

1000652011.english: - After silently watching the Arctic expedition team for a while, Glacius turned back to me.
1000652011.korean: - 한동안 말없이 북극 탐험대를 바라보던 글라시아스가 다시 내게 고개를 돌렸다.

1000652012.english: You must have a lot of questions.

1000652014.english: Well, I've been fighting hard against the Lemonades for decades, even tho it can be summarized in a single sentence.
1000652014.korean: 뭐, 수십 년 동안 레모네이드들과 열심히 싸웠습니다, 한 문장으로 요약되긴 하지만.

1000652016.english: No, it has nothing to do with the works I've appeared in.

1000652017.english: I know better than anyone that I am both the actor and the puppet.
1000652017.korean: 내가 배우이자, 꼭두각시라는 사실은 누구보다 스스로 잘 알고 있으니.

1000652018.english: It's simply because I consider it important and cherish it. Do you understand?
1000652018.korean: 그저 그것을 내가 중요하게, 소중하게 생각하기 때문이다. 이해하겠느냐?

1000652019.english: - Several faces came to mind in response to Glacia's question.

1000652021.english: What? You said you didn't understand last time!
1000652021.korean: 뭐야, 너 저번에는 이해 못 한다며!

1000652022.english: Looks like I'm the only one who got played again. And my older sister is at it again, all 'Huhu, is that so?' and putting on a kindly image.
1000652022.korean: 이거 또 나만 바보됐구만. 우리 누님은 또 '후후, 그렇느냐' 하면서 인자한 이미지 메이킹이나 하고.

1000652024.english: Ugh, this life is just one big loss. Oh, right. Hey friend, how did that go?
1000652024.korean: 에잇, 손해만 보는 인생. 아, 맞다. 친구, 그거는 어떻게 됐어?

1000652025.english: - A while ago, when I was talking with Peregrinus and Alfred, I heard that there was a problem with the body of the Glacius and they were asking if it could be fixed.
1000652025.korean: - 얼마 전 페레그리누스, 알프레드와 이야기를 나눌 때, 글라시아스의 동체에 문제가 생겼는데 고쳐줄 수 있냐는 이야기를 들었었다.

1000652027.english: Oh, why? Can't you even ask a friend for this much?
1000652027.korean: 아, 왜요. 친구한테 이정도 부탁도 못합니까.

1000652029.english: Heh heh, surprised, big sister? I was really surprised when I heard it yesterday too.
1000652029.korean: 흐흐, 깜짝 놀랐지 누님? 나도 어제 듣고 엄청 놀랐다고.

1000652031.english: - After calling for the Doctor and Azaz to ask them to look after Glacius, Peregrinus whispered in a soft voice.
1000652031.korean: - 닥터와 아자즈를 호출해 글라시아스를 부탁한 뒤, 페레그리누스가 은근한 목소리로 속삭였다.

1000652033.english: You know, in the original plan for the next work, I was supposed to transform into an incredibly cool version of myself and die together with the strongest of the enemy executives.
1000652033.korean: 내가 말야, 원래 차기작에서 내가 엄청나게 멋진 모습으로 변신해서 적 간부중에 제일 강한 녀석과 동귀어진 한다는 전개가 예정되어 있었거든.

1000652034.english: Could you take a look at mine too?

1000652035.english: What, are you discriminating? You immediately said yes to your older sister.
1000652035.korean: 뭐야, 차별하냐? 누님한테는 바로 OK 해놓고.

1000652037.english: O my kin! Come here quickly, for I shall bestow upon you the spoils I have obtained!
1000652037.korean: 권속이여! 짐이 얻어낸 전리품을 하사할테니 어서 이리로 오거라!

1000652038.english: Ugh, fine. How would that girl react if she saw the real Jinjo kid?
1000652038.korean: 큭, 그래. 저 아가씨가 진짜 진조 꼬맹이를 보면 어떻게 반응할까?

1000652040.english: - I returned to the captain's cabin after a long time and checked the overall progress of the work.
1000652040.korean: - 오랜만에 함장실로 돌아와 전체적인 일의 진행상황을 확인했다.

1000652042.english: However, it seems we'll need the new year to dawn before all the work is completed and the situation stabilizes.
1000652042.korean: 다만 모든 작업이 완료되고, 상황을 안정화하려면 새해가 밝아야할 것 같습니다.

1000652043.english: Unfortunately, given the circumstances, it's a shame, but we should either skip the year-end party or keep it small...
1000652043.korean: 아쉽지만 상황이 상황인 만큼, 연말 파티는 넘어가거나 조촐하게 하는 것이...

1000652044.english: - It would definitely be difficult to throw a grand party in such a chaotic situation.
1000652044.korean: - 확실히 이렇게 어수선한 상황에서 성대한 파티를 열거나 하는 건 어렵겠지.

1000652045.english: Or, Your Majesty could prepare the gift while we are working.
1000652045.korean: 아니면, 저희가 업무를 보는 동안 폐하께서 선물을 준비해 주셔도 괜찮습니다.

1000652046.english: - I remembered the winter a few years ago when I stayed up for weeks and trudged thru the snow, not sleeping at all, to prepare gifts for the team members.
1000652046.korean: - 몇 년 전의 겨울, 대원들을 위한 선물을 준비하겠다고 몇 주 동안 잠도 안자고 눈밭을 헤맸던 것을 떠올렸다.

1000652047.english: It's a bit belated, but... we were truly overjoyed at that time, Your Majesty.
1000652047.korean: 새삼스럽지만… 그때 저희는 정말로 기뻤습니다, 폐하.

1000652052.english: ...Thank you so much for being here with us.

1000652053.english: Your Majesty, you are truly precious to us.

1000652054.english: - Armand, who had been holding me for a while, pulled away and smiled brightly.
1000652054.korean: - 한동안 날 끌어안고 있던 아르망은 몸을 떼곤 생긋 웃었다.

1000652056.english: Currently, we are unable to engage in active external activities. Right?
1000652056.korean: 현재 저희는 적극적인 외부 활동을 벌일 수 없는 상황입니다. 그렇죠?

1000652057.english: Typically, reconnaissance missions there can be handled by the commanders of each unit. Right?
1000652057.korean: 거기에 통상 정찰 임무는 각 부대의 대장들 선에서 처리 가능합니다. 그렇죠?

1000652058.english: In that sense, I will convey the decision made unanimously by all members of the Orca Resistance.
1000652058.korean: 그런 의미에서, 오르카 저항군 전원의 만장일치로 결정된 사항을 대신 전달드립니다.

1000652059.english: Please take a break from your duties until the garrison is stable and spend some time with us while you rest.
1000652059.korean: 주둔지가 안정될 때까지업무는 잠깐 내려두시고, 쉬면서 저희와 시간을 보내주세요.

1000652060.english: Instead of answering my question, Armand smiled and held out his hand.
1000652060.korean: - 아르망은 내 물음에 대답하는 대신, 빙긋 웃으며 손을 내밀었다.

1000652061.english: Your Majesty? Your Majesty's precious panel, I will keep it for a moment.
1000652061.korean: 폐하? 폐하의 소중한 패널은 제가 잠시 맡아두겠습니다.

1000652062.english: - My panel, which I always carried with me for immediate work, no matter where or when I went... is leaving me...?
1000652062.korean: - 어딜가나 언제든지, 즉각적인 업무를 위해 항상 지니고 다니던 나의 패널이… 내 곁을 떠난다고…?

1000652063.english: - Whether my protesting gaze didn't convey my feelings or not, Armand's smile deepened further.
1000652063.korean: - 내 항변하는 눈빛이 전해지지 않은 건지, 아르망의 미소는 더욱 깊어졌다.

1000652064.english: - I squeezed my eyes shut and held out the panel. The familiar texture of the panel, as familiar as my own body, slipped thru my fingers.
1000652064.korean: - 눈을 질끈 감고 패널을 내밀었다. 마치 내 몸처럼 익숙한, 패널의 감촉이 손을 빠져나갔다.

1000652065.english: Thank you for granting my request, Your Majesty.

1000652066.english: For the time being, unless it's a situation equivalent to a Level 1 emergency, we will handle the work. It's no different from usual.
1000652066.korean: 당분간은 1급 비상 상황에 준하는 상황이 아닌 이상 업무는 저희가 처리하겠습니다. 평소랑 다르지 않습니다.

1000652067.english: - Originally, most tasks were meant to be handled by the commanders and their staff.
1000652067.korean: - 원래도 어지간한 업무는 전부 대장급들과 참모진 선에서 처리되도록 되어있다.

1000652068.english: - However, I've been doing various things because I've been restless...
1000652068.korean: - 다만 내가 몸이 근질거려서 이것저것 일을 해왔던건데…

1000652070.english: - Armand gently placed his hand on my head.
1000652070.korean: - 아르망이 부드럽게 내 머리에 손을 올렸다.

1000652071.english: We are no longer living in fear of just surviving until tomorrow, as we used to.
1000652071.korean: 저희는 이전처럼 당장 내일 살아남을 것을 걱정하며 지내고 있지 않습니다.

1000652073.english: So, this time... please spend your Majesty's time entirely for us.
1000652073.korean: 그러니 이번에는… 폐하의 시간을 온전히 저희를 위해 써주세요.

1000652075.english: I will now go to work, but please feel free to visit anytime if Your Majesty has the time.
1000652075.korean: 저는 이제 업무를 보러 가겠습니다만, 폐하께서 시간이 나신다면 언제든 찾아와주세요.

1000652076.english: - Armand smiled faintly and left the captain's cabin.

1000652077.english: - The warmth that filled my heart with kind words slowly fades away, and an endless emptiness takes its place.
1000652077.korean: - 다정한 말에 가슴을 채웠던 훈훈함이 천천히 빠져나가고, 그 자리를 끝을 알 수 없는 공허함이 채운다.

1000652078.english: - I'll just need to check the operation status of the team members who scouted a bit further south.
1000652078.korean: - 남쪽 다소 멀리까지 정찰나간 대원들의 작전 진행상황까지만 확인해야겠군.

1000652079.english: - The island's name was... I think it was the Bier something island...
1000652079.korean: - 섬 이름이… 비에르 무슨 섬이었던 것 같은데…

1000652080.english: - Rationalizing to myself, I turned on the monitor on my desk.
1000652080.korean: - 스스로 합리화를 하며 책상의 모니터를 켰다.

1000652081.english: - Heh heh... It's not me who's bad... It's you who took my job away from me- Huh?
1000652081.korean: - 후후… 내가 나쁜게 아니야… 내게서 일을 빼앗아간 너희들이- 어라?

1000652082.english: - Just as I was about to open the operation document, the user 'Cardinal Armand' took permission.
1000652082.korean: - 작전 문서를 열람하려는 순간, ‘Cardinal Armand’라는 사용자가 권한을 가져갔다.

1000652083.english: - Soon, the operation details will show a 'Completed' mark, and a unit returning will be added to the unit status board.
1000652083.korean: - 곧 작전 내용에는 ‘완료됨’이라는 표시가 생기고, 부대 현황판에 복귀중인 부대가 추가됐다.

1000652084.english: - I quickly looked for another document. Okay, regarding the 'Year-End Special Ration Distribution'...!
1000652084.korean: - 황급히 다른 문서를 찾았다. 좋아, ‘연말 특별 부식 불출의 건’ 이거라면…!

1000652085.english: - This time, the user 'α' took the agenda.

1000652086.english: - He leaned back in his chair as if collapsing. Even as that happens, work is being processed in real-time.
1000652086.korean: - 무너지듯 의자에 몸을 기댔다. 그러는 순간에도 업무는 실시간으로 처리되고 있다.

1000652087.english: - Before leaving the captain's cabin, he glanced at the monitor one last time.
1000652087.korean: - 함장실을 나서기 전에 마지막으로 모니터에 시선을 주었다.

1000652090.english: As soon as reconnaissance is complete, please prepare for the establishment of a garrison. I'll be staying here for a while.
1000652090.korean: 정찰 완료되는대로 주둔지 구축 준비해줘. 당분간 여기서 머물거야.

1000652091.english: That's right. Have you found the 'Ark of Memory'?

1000652092.english: Okay. Let me know if you find it.

1000652097.english: That's because the Empress is a troublemaker.

1000652098.english: But what kind of android is Mnemosyne?

1000652100.english: Well, it certainly looks that way. It looks mineral-like.
1000652100.korean: 음, 확실히 외견으로는 그러네. 무기질 해보여.

1000652101.english: The founder of the Watchers of Nature?

1000652103.english: Shall we go then? Could you guide us?

1000652104.english: But does it work for anyone who's human?  So, you don't have any authority or anything?
1000652104.korean: 그런데 인간이면 다 되는 거야? 뭐 권한 같은 건 없어?

1000652105.english: That's true... But why are you telling me now?
1000652105.korean: 그건 그렇네... 근데 왜 이제야 말해줘?

1000652107.english: ... Hey guys, it's a bit difficult to walk.

1000652113.english: Um... Do I just need to hold your hand?

1000652114.english: Wait a minute, Abel? And you call it special authority?

1000652118.english: Yeah. The reconnaissance team is searching inside the ark, so ask them.
1000652118.korean: 응. 정찰대가 방주 내부를 수색 중이니까 한 번 물어봐.

1000652124.english: No, you wouldn't have been able to do anything on your own.

1000652125.english: It's a mess. Are there any genes that are still intact?

1000652129.english: ... You've worked hard all this time, Mnemosyne. Leave the rest to us.

1000652130.english: Yeah. A PECS Bioroid combatant, huh...

1000652131.english: Have you figured out the numbers?

1000652132.english: So many stragglers? What happened during the retreat?
1000652132.korean: 낙오 병력이 이렇게나? 후퇴하면서 무슨 일이 있었나?

1000652133.english: ... Capture them alive if possible, but kill them if it seems like it will cause casualties on our side.
1000652133.korean: ...가급적 생포하되, 아군 피해가 생길 것 같으면 사살해.

1000652135.english: First, disseminate the relevant information to the unit. And-
1000652135.korean: 일단 관련 사항 부대에 전파해. 그리고-

1000652137.english: ... Tell them to aim for the head and shoot to kill if possible.

1000652139.english: Um... But I've thought this before, that body is just too much...
1000652139.korean: 어... 근데 전에도 생각했지만, 그 몸 너무 부담스러운데…

1000652145.english: Information zone, huh? I should go check it out sometime.

1000652150.english: Can you help me with the gene zone cleanup? Maybe there's still something that can be saved.
1000652150.korean: 유전자 구역 수습하는 것 좀 도와줘. 혹시 아직 살릴 수 있는 게 있을지도 몰라.

1000652152.english: The enemies who invaded the ark will be dealt with soon. And the outside is the same.
1000652152.korean: 방주에 침입한 적들은 곧 정리 될거야. 바깥도 마찬가지고.

1000652154.english: So, are we allowed to just leave?

1000652155.english: Sorry. We'll be here for a while, and even if we leave, Mnemosyne will be coming with us.
1000652155.korean: 미안. 우린 당분간 여기 있을거고, 떠나게 돼도 므네모시네도 같이 갈 거야.

1000652157.english: Earlier, the gene zone and... Unlike the lobby, it's ordinary.
1000652157.korean: 아까 유전자 구역도 그렇고... 로비랑 달리 평범하네.

1000652158.english: The lobby felt like a castle.

1000652160.english: Hmm, doesn't Mnemosyne have access to the information in the Ark?
1000652160.korean: 음, 므네모시네는 방주에 있는 정보에 대한 열람 권한 없어?

1000652161.english: So, have you ever looked into things outside?
1000652161.korean: 그럼 바깥에 대한 거, 찾아본 적 없어?

1000652163.english: ... So, to summarize, you're saying the information was tampered with along the way, right?

1000652166.english: If it's this thorough, I can't even get angry...

1000652167.english: There's nothing you can do about the past. First, please back up the remaining information to our database.
1000652167.korean: 지나간 일은 어쩔 수 없지. 일단 남은 정보만 우리 데이터 베이스에 백업해줘.

1000652169.english: Hmm, how long will the recovery take?
